title: Pet Tile Master
description: Enjoy a fun pet-themed tile-matching challenge in Pet Tile Master! Draw up to 9 tiles featuring adorable pets and match three identical ones to clear them. Be careful—if the stack fills up with 9 tiles, the game is over! Use smart moves to uncover hidden tiles and complete each level. Have fun with cute animals, relaxing gameplay, and tricky puzzles!

title: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle
description: Fruit Match Juicy Puzzle is an irresistibly fun puzzle casual game that bursts with juicy visuals and addictive gameplay! A brilliant combination of puzzle and match mechanics. From the moment you start, you’ll be hooked on its satisfying matching mechanics and clever level design.

title: Through the Wall 3D
description: Through the Wall 3D takes the mind-bending puzzle gameplay of the original Through the Wall to a whole new level with stunning 3D graphics! Test your reflexes, strategy, and flexibility as you contort your character to match a variety of dynamic shapes in a visually immersive world.

title: Bird Sort Challenges
description:
Bird Sort Challenges  is a fun and relaxing game where you sort colorful birds perched on branches, arranging them by matching colors.
Test your problem-solving skills as you strategize to ensure no branch overflows and complete each puzzle efficiently.
Whether you’re looking to unwind or sharpen your mind, Bird Sort: Color Sort Puzzle offers endless entertainment in a cheerful and visually pleasing world.
Good luck!

title: Jump to the Mountain for the Brainrots
description:
You'll play as Obby, a character located on a tall mountain.
Various Brainrots will randomly appear on the mountain, guarded by enemies.
Your task is to jump up the mountain and rescue the Brainrots. Collect the entire Brainrot collection without falling into enemy hands!
Sell Brainrots to increase your jump height and reach the very top of the mountain. Rare Brainrot species live at the very top.

title: Kings and Queens Match 3
description: Step into Kings and Queens Match 3, the enchanting third chapter of the royal Match-3 adventure! Match jewels, crowns, and other royal artifacts to progress through exciting levels. Use powerful boosters like bombs, hammers, and royal blasts to clear challenging boards. Unlock new parts of the kingdom as you enjoy stunning visuals and a charming soundtrack. Join the royal quest and discover treasure, challenge, and endless fun!

title: Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve
description: Celebrate the magic of the holiday season with Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve, a delightful game where players join Ellie and Ben as they prepare for the most wonderful night of the year. From decorating the tree to picking the perfect outfits, this game brings the charm of Christmas to life in a fun and interactive way.

title: Space.io
description: Jump into the cockpit of a powerful spaceship and engage in fast-paced 3D space battles! Face off against 9 other enemy ships in an intense dogfight where only the best pilot survives. Shoot down your opponents before they take you out, climb the rankings, and prove you're the ultimate space warrior! Unlock a wide variety of skins to customize your ship and dominate the battlefield in style. Can you claim the top spot?

title: Labubu Pop
description:
Labubu Pop is a bright and cheerful puzzle game where the playful Labubus have completely taken over the box! Connect matching characters into chains, clear the board, and earn points to level up. Each stage brings fun surprises, and even more exciting combos!

With its colorful visuals, smooth animations, and simple yet addictive gameplay, Labubu Pop is perfect for relaxing and having fun anytime. The longer your chain — the higher your score and the flashier the effects!

title: Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary
description: Welcome to Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary – the place where your style dreams come to life! Step into the shoes of a talented fashion designer, build your own boutique, and create stunning outfits that dazzle the world. From fabric to final look, you’re in charge of every stitch!

title: Obby - Escape Barry's jail parkour
description: An incredible escape from the New Barry Prison awaits you! Cool locations, parkour and obby. Show your agility to avoid getting caught by Barry.

title: Battle Arena
description: Fight enemies, grow your army, and dominate the battlefield! Upgrade your camp, train your soldiers and earn tons of coins to expand your unstoppable arsenal. Ready to battle?

title: i8 City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning supercar through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Cinema Business - Idle Games
description:
Build and manage your own cinema empire! 
Unlock movie rooms, snack and burger corners to attract more customers.
Hire staff, upgrade facilities, and keep your theater running smoothly.
Earn cash even while you’re offline and grow your business.
Become the ultimate cinema tycoon in this fun idle arcade game!

title: Rooftop Run
description: Run, jump, and slide over rooftops in this fast-paced parkour game! Dodge obstacles, smash through barriers, and escape from enemies as you race through exciting levels.

title: Savage Defenders
description: A tower defense strategy action game where you become the last hope of a tribe living at the foot of an ancient volcano. When an asteroid with an alien threat falls to the planet, you must combine magic, tactics and the strength of warriors to stop the invader who is devouring all life.

title: Road Digging Puzzle
description:
This is a puzzle game. you can make a way to pass a level. Dig your way through unique physics puzzles.

It's new and fun brain teasers each step of the way.

title: Back To School: Uniforms Edition
description: Explore global fashion in Back to School: Uniforms Edition! This fun dress-up game lets you spin the wheel to unlock school uniforms from countries like Japan, the U.S., the U.K., India, France, and South Korea. Customize your character with stylish outfits, accessories, and hairstyles inspired by each culture. Dive into the diversity of school uniforms and become a fashion expert while having fun!

title: Hidden Object: Street Of Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Street of Secrets is an atmospheric hidden object game where you become the lead detective. A mysterious case awaits, and your insightful assistant is there to help, offering hints and guiding you to crucial details.

title: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow
description: Geometry Vibes X Arrow is the newest evolution of the Geometry Vibes series, offering the most refined, competitive and customizable arrow experience so far. The goal is simple but demanding: guide your arrow through dangerous geometric paths, survive increasingly difficult patterns and reach the portal at the end of each route without touching anything.

title: Ultimate Yatzy
description: Ultimate Yatzy is the classic dice game that delivers endless fun and excitement. Roll five dice to score the best combinations and outsmart your opponents. Whether you're a casual player or a Yatzy pro, this game blends strategy and luck to keep you challenged and entertained. Aim for a Full House, a Straight, or the elusive Yatzy—every roll is a new chance to win.

title: Travel Mahjong Deluxe
description: Travel Mahjong Deluxe is a relaxing tile-matching puzzle where you match identical tiles and strategically clear the board. Find pairs of beautiful travel-themed tiles that are free on at least one side and remove them to complete each level. As you progress, new layouts and challenges will keep the game fresh and engaging. Use the Hint feature whenever you get stuck, or watch a reward video to gain unlimited time and continue your puzzle-solving adventure.

title: Dinosaur Shifting Run
description: Get ready for a prehistoric race unlike any other! Dinosaur Shifting Run throws you into a thrilling adventure where you transform into mighty dinosaurs to overcome obstacles and outrun rivals.

title: Cute Kitty Merge
description: Step into the role of a farmer and grow your own fruits and vegetables. In Solitaire TriPeaks Farming you will spend time in beautiful nature and play fun and constantly changing levels that will never allow for boredom. It is all about having fun.

title: Lost in the Forest
description:
Lost in the forest is a classic adventure game. The protagonist is an airman who ends up in a storm, loses control of his plane and falls into a mysterious forest.
The next day is stuck under a tree and must find a way to break free and solve various puzzles to make it back home safely.

title: Pixel Flow
description: Come to train your brain with colors and paths. Pixel Flow is a clean and addictive pixel puzzle game that challenges your logic and planning skills. In each level, you must send kittens of different colors into the track. Pixel points matching the kittens' colors will be eliminated. Paths cannot cross or overlap, so every move matters.

title: Zooma Dragon
description:
Zooma Dragon is a brand new and amazing zoom style game!
Complete all 300 levels! Try to get three stars in each level!
A bright adventure with colored balls awaits you!
Instead of a frog, you will play as a dragon.

title: Arcade GP
description: ARCADE GP is a retro-style top-down Formula 1 racing game with strategic tire management and pit stop mechanics. Race against AI opponents, manage tire wear, and make tactical decisions to claim victory!

title: Screw Spin
description:
Screw Spin is a satisfying logic puzzle where you unscrew colorful bolts and sort them into matching boxes. It’s relaxing yet challenging, combining planning, logic, and a touch of strategy.

Each level introduces a new layout with bolts of different colors. Your goal is to clear the entire panel by removing all the bolts, carefully managing your limited storage slots and placing each bolt in the correct container.

title: Hexa Tap Away
description: Hexa Tap Away is a sleek one-direction hex puzzle. Drag tiles to move them in the only direction they can travel, create space, and clear the board. Each level adds trickier layouts, blockers, and tight corridors that demand planning ahead. Short, snackable stages, smooth controls, and a clean look make it easy to start and hard to stop. Stuck? Try a hint or rethink your route and there’s always a smarter move!

title: Draw To Smash Zombie
description: Draw To Smash Zombie is an exciting drawing logic puzzle game where your creativity becomes the ultimate weapon against waves of silly zombies.

title: Obby: Tsunami Escape +1 by Car
description:
A giant tsunami is approaching - and only you can outrun it! Dodge the waves, upgrade your car, and race to the finish line. The faster you get, the further you can go.

Buy new cars - each one gives you more speed, control, and capabilities.
Upgrade your vehicles to survive the most challenging races.
Defeat brainrots - from common to rare and legendary ones.
Practice, improve your reactions, and find the perfect strategy.

title: Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d
description: Roll your block across challenging 3D platforms and drop it into the goal hole to solve each puzzle. Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d is an addictive block puzzle game that tests your logic, spatial thinking, and problem-solving skills across dozens of mind-bending levels.

title: Number Rush
description:
You can absorb smaller or equal numbers while avoiding obstacles.
If you collide with a number bigger than you, it's game over.
Make the largest number possible to break through the wall and get the treasure chest~!

title: Monster School vs Siren Head
My Castle. Merge & Story
description:
My Castle: Merge & Story is a relaxing merge 2 puzzle game set in a warm and atmospheric medieval world of renewal, mystery, and self-discovery. Merge items, restore and decorate an ancient castle, and follow the journey of a young princess who chooses a new path in life.
This calm offline merge adventure combines cozy gameplay, castle restoration, and a story about starting over — far from royal expectations, closer to one’s true self.
Restore and Decorate a Forgotten Castle

title: Winter Tetrix Trails
description:
Winter Tetrix Trails is a relaxing shape-filling puzzle game set in a snowy world.
Drag and place colorful Tetris-style blocks to complete each unique silhouette — think carefully, fit perfectly, and enjoy the magic of winter puzzles!

title: Break Beat
description: Break Beat is a fast-paced and colorful brick-breaker game with a pixel art/neon aesthetic and an electronic music soundtrack.

title: Happy Egg Catch
description:
Happy Egg Catch is a fun and colorful arcade skill game where timing and precision are the key to victory!

Eggs are hanging from the top and swinging back and forth. Your goal is simple: tap at the perfect moment to release the egg and land it safely inside the basket below. But be careful, the basket moves to different positions every round, so you must aim your throw carefully!

Test your reflexes, master the swing timing, and see how many eggs you can catch in a row!

title: Hidden Paint 3D
description: Coloring 3D is a relaxing and creative game where you bring the world to life with color. Tap objects to instantly paint them in bright, beautiful shades and watch scenes transform. Simple controls and calm gameplay make it perfect for all ages and stress-free fun.

title: Super Tank Wrestle
description: Welcome to the world of tank battles, where you can control tanks to fight with other enemies on different maps. There are also a wealth of tanks for you to choose from!

title: Nuwpy's Adventure
description:
Nuwpy’s Adventure is a classic pixel-art platformer inspired by retro arcade games!
Help Nuwpy explore colorful worlds, collect coins, jump over enemies, and avoid traps.
Each level offers new challenges, hidden secrets, and a fast-paced journey full of charm and nostalgia.
Dive into the pixel world and enjoy simple yet addictive gameplay!

title: Bunnyhop and Surf Maps
description: Game that brings bunnyhop and surf from "Counter Strike" straight to your browser! The game features a variety of parkour maps, many knife skins, unique bunnyhop mechanics, the ability to accelerate with a knife, and the opportunity to compete with other players to see who can reach the finish line first.

title: Royal Pin
description: Royal Pin: King Adventure – A thrilling rescue puzzle game where you save the King, protect the kingdom, and rebuild the castle! Solve tricky pin puzzles, help the queen and princess, and become the ultimate king of this adventure!

title: Fury Tanks
description: Beyond the hills and forests, war waits in silence. When it starts, it’s you, your tank and the enemy in your sights. Build your armor, power up your cannon and let instinct guide your aim. When the ground shakes, make sure it’s because you fired first.

title: Pottery Master
description: Pottery Master invites you into a peaceful world of creativity and clay. Shape, sculpt, and refine your pottery using intuitive tools, then add your personal touch with vibrant colors. Each creation is a moment to unwind, express your style, and transform simple clay into a stunning masterpiece in a relaxing, artistic flow

title: Chicken Banana Quest
description: Help the Chicken and Banana to solve all puzzle quest and find the play button. Use your skills to solve the puzzles before the lives run out and complete all levels with the less possible clicks

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Darling Doll
description: Darling Doll is the ultimate paper doll DIY game that offers a perfect blend of character creation and dress-up game. With a vast collection of outfits, accessories, and hairstyles, you can unleash your creativity and design unique avatars that reflect your personal style. Whether you prefer chibi dolls or glamorous fashion dolls, Darling Doll has got you covered.

title: Build a Go-Kart
description:
Build your karting empire from scratch — from simple straights to complex tracks with boosts and risky turns.

Design unique tracks using modular blocks: combine elements, optimize your route, and find the perfect balance between speed and profit. Every ride earns money — and your track design determines how much you make.

title: Slingshot Fortress
description: Slingshot Fortress is an addictive 2D physics-based destruction game where precision, timing, and strategy are essential. Use your slingshot to launch stones, bombs, and shurikens to destroy towers, collapse structures, and uncover hidden enemies. Explore vibrant levels from forests to icy lands, unlock powerful abilities, trigger explosive chain reactions, and master increasingly challenging puzzles in this fun, casual browser game experience.

title: Color Nonogram Puzzle 2
description: Relaxing Color Nonogram is a vibrant logic puzzle game where every grid reveals stunning pixel art. Solve colorful nonogram challenges, train your brain, and enjoy a calm, stress-free experience. Perfect for fans of Picross and classic logic puzzles, this free nonogram game blends strategy, creativity, and relaxation. Discover hundreds of levels, improve focus, and unwind anytime with satisfying color puzzle gameplay designed for both beginners and experts.

title: Revoxel 3D - Voxel RPG Shooter
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic voxel-style RPG shooter with a cyberpunk atmosphere. A dark futuristic city overrun by a tech corporation awaits you, along with endless battles with robots and monsters, character development, and constant action in the spirit of a shooter RPG.

title: VegaMix Match-3 Village
description: A cozy match-3 with a heartfelt story! ? Visit grandma in the village — she’s a true star with fun tales from her youth. Play classic match-3 levels, earn stars and complete quests for villagers. Bright puzzles, touching stories, colorful graphics and daily bonuses await you. Perfect for short sessions and relaxing breaks. ? For fans of match-3 with plot, coziness and helping heroes.

title: Word Search Universe
description: Word Search Universe is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you search for hidden words in a grid. The game has 20 chapters, and each one comes with easy, medium, and hard levels to match your skill. In every level, you need to find 6 hidden words. If you get stuck, you can use a hint to help you out. It's a great way to have fun, improve your vocabulary, and keep your brain sharp!

title: Island Puzzle: Build & Solve
description: Welcome to the ultimate Island Puzzle adventure! Test your logic and strategy skills in this captivating logic puzzle and building game.

title: Age of Zombies
description:
Age of Zombies, the nostalgic and thrilling twin-stick shooter, takes you through time to save the world from the undead menace with Barry Steakfries!  Age of Zombies is delivering pure, unadulterated fun with an unforgettable cast of characters.

Experience a lighthearted, action-packed story that spans 24 levels across 8 diverse worlds. Confront 7 unique bosses, encounter a variety of zombie types, and compete in 12 Horde levels for a spot on the leaderboards.

title: People Playground! Ragdoll Arena!
description:
People Playground! Ragdoll Arena! is a fun physics-based adventure where chaos is the goal. Tap and hold objects to move them, then release to throw them at the doll.

Your goal:
Inflict maximum damage and destroy your doll using everything at your disposal. Drop a car on his head, throw a rock at him, or throw him off a cliff. Every action triggers a reaction, so experiment with different ways to destroy. Sometimes there will be multiple dolls: twice the targets, twice the strategies!

title: Treasure Hunt Puzzle
description: Explore ruins, complete stone tablet puzzles, and collect treasures! Solve each puzzle by fitting all your blocks into the board using the symbols as hints.

title: Blast Cubes
description: Blast Cubes is an addictive puzzle game where players strategically place cubes on a grid. When cubes align in horizontal or vertical rows, they explode, triggering an exciting chain reaction! After the explosion, characters of the same color as the exploded cube emerge and move towards vehicles of the same color waiting at the top. Once the vehicles are filled, new ones appear, continuing the cycle.

title: Cheerful Plumber
description: Greetings, young artist. Do you like video games and creativity? Then this game is for you! Color video game characters: a princess, a cheerful plumber, a dragon and others! Choose different colors on the main and secondary palette. Play and color! Take a screenshot and share the result with your friends!

title: Toilet Time
description: Toilet Time is more than just a puzzle game—it’s a hilarious journey into the quirkiest parts of everyday life. Challenge yourself with toilet-inspired puzzles that combine creativity, wit, and humor.

title: Zip Zap
description: Step into the fascinating world of Zip Zap, a unique online physics puzzle game that blends mechanics, movement, and precision. Tap, twist, and control your way through clever levels filled with moving parts and intricate structures. Every stage tests your timing and creativity — can you reach every target? Play for free on desktop or mobile and enjoy a perfectly balanced mix of challenge and relaxation.

title: Gummy merge
description: Jelly merge is an endless game in which to merge identical marmalades. The goal of the game is to reach the final marmalade.

title: Artillery Vs Tanks
description: In this game, you take control of an artillery unit and engage in combat against enemy tanks. The result of the battle hinges on how precisely you target your shots – will you obliterate all the tanks before they reach you, or will they overpower you? Take out your foes and collect rewards to enhance your howitzer's performance and acquire fresh, more formidable artillery weapons!

title: Arrow Puzzle
description: Arrow Puzzle is a relaxing logic game that turns simple taps into a rewarding challenge. Your goal is straightforward: find a free path, tap arrows in the right order, and enjoy as the maze slowly turns into a clear, empty board. Follow the arrows to escape the puzzle and find a soothing flow that keeps your mind engaged and relaxed.

title: Sort Balls - Cones
description: Immerse yourself in a calming logic puzzle where your goal is to sort colored balls into separate tubes. Plan each move carefully so that every tube contains balls of only one color. The straightforward mechanics gradually evolve into more challenging levels that test your focus and strategic thinking.

title: Molang Match'n Munch
description:
Join Molang and Piu Piu in a heartwarming match-3 adventure! Travel the world, collect rare ingredients, and solve sweet puzzles to save the lost recipes in the Great Book of Flavors before they vanish forever!
Travel through the world's greatest real and imaginary cities, collect rare ingredients, and solve delicious match-3 puzzles to advance and save these culinary treasures!

title: Dogs vs Aliens
description: Your favorite pets have been kidnapped by evil aliens! Hurry to save them and punish the alien bullies. Evolve to defeat stronger enemies, free new dogs, get unique resources so that your dogs can evolve! Collect all the dog breeds and see how cool they will be! Discover new territories, visit the beach, park, city square and forest!

title: Dinosaurs vs Asteroids
description: Giant asteroids are crashing down on Earth. But the dinosaurs have a plan! They have special mounts on their backs where you can attach a variety of weapons: from miniguns and flamethrowers to alien shotguns and blasters. Additionally, there are special species of dinosaurs that can shoot powerful spikes or break asteroids with their claws.

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: A premium, modern Sliding Puzzle game featuring progressive levels, AI auto-solve, custom themes, and satisfying sound effects. Challenge yourself with 3x3, 4x4, and 5x5 grids. Arrange numbered tiles in order by sliding them into the empty space. Perfect for brain training and logic improvement!

title: Puzzle Masters: Travelers
description:
Puzzle Masters Travelers is a relaxing and colorful jigsaw puzzle game where you assemble beautiful landscapes from dozens of pieces.
Travel across stunning locations around the world, unlock new sceneries, and enjoy the soothing atmosphere of discovery!
Use helpful boosters to finish each picture before the timer runs out. Challenge your focus, patience, and speed — and become a true puzzle master!

title: Merge Blocks 2048
description: Swipe to slide numbered tiles on a 4x4 grid. Match two identical blocks to merge them into a bigger number. Start from 2 and work your way up to 2048 and beyond. The board fills up with every move so plan ahead. Chain multiple merges in a row to build combos and earn bonus coins. Spend coins in the shop on power-ups like Undo, Extra Life, Score Boost, Shuffle and Head Start. Beat your high score and try to reach the highest tile possible. Easy to learn, hard to master.

title: Mojicon Garden Connect
description: Looking for a relaxing puzzle break? The 6th Mojicon game is here to help you unwind! Mojicon Garden Connect brings the beauty of spring right to your screen. Connect colorful tiles at your own pace and watch the garden come to life. As you play, you'll unlock 20 fun, hidden Discoveries featuring adorable garden friends. Now lighter and smoother than ever, it’s the perfect polished puzzle for your downtime.

title: Arrow Escape: Master
description: Solve funny brain puzzles by moving the arrow and finding the correct path. Each level challenges your logic, reflexes, and creativity in a light and addictive way.

title: TCG Card Clicker
description: TCG Card Clicker is an addictive clicker game inspired by TCG Card Shop Simulator, where collecting never stops! Click to earn coins, open card packs, and expand your collection with over 8000 unique cards. Each card boosts your passive income, letting you earn more even when you're not clicking! Trade duplicates to discover new cards and complete your ultimate collection. Can you find the rarest cards and become the ultimate collector

title: C.A.P.
description:
Take to the skies and protect the carrier in this shooter inspired by WW2 dogfights. 
Dodge enemy fighters, protect your aircraft carrier, and blast through waves of incoming planes. 
Remember to come back to the carrier to refuel!
With crisp pixel-art 3D visuals and one-touch controls, this shooter delivers satisfying action perfect for short play.

title: Archery Master
description: With a dynamic progression system, players unlock powerful bows, master challenging mechanics like wind and moving targets, and climb the leaderboards. From stationary targets to tricky trajectories, each level will test your reflexes and skill.

title: Match Masters
description: Match Masters is a real-time multiplayer match-3 puzzle game where players compete head-to-head on the same board. Each move requires strategic thinking, as it can benefit both you and your opponent. Utilize unique boosters, participate in tournaments, and climb the global leaderboards in this dynamic and engaging game.

title: Sort Works: Nuts & Order
description:
Sort Works: Nuts & Order is a fun color-sorting puzzle game where you organize colorful nuts onto matching bolts.

? How to Play:

* Tap a bolt to pick up the top nut.
* Drop it onto a matching color or empty bolt.
* Sort all nuts by color to win!

? Easy to learn, challenging to master, with hundreds of levels and a clean mechanical design—perfect for puzzle fans and casual gamers!

title: Lion Family Sim Online
description: Step into the wild and rule the savannah in Lion Family Sim Online. It’s a full animal simulation adventure where you live the life of a mighty lion. Build and grow your own lion family, explore vast open landscapes, and face thrilling challenges. Hunt for food to survive, protect your territory, and lead your pride with strength and strategy.

title: Farm Defense
description: Farm Defense is a fast, arcade-style shooter where you guard your ranch from waves of quirky mutants. Move between lanes, aim, and blast anything that crawls out of the burrows before it reaches your crops. Earn coins, unlock new weapons and gadgets, and power up your electric fence. Bright visuals, snappy controls, and escalating waves make every run tense and satisfying.

title: Find Hidden Cats
description: Explore charming black-and-white scenes inspired by iconic European cities in this relaxing yet addictive hidden object game. Every corner is packed with clever details and playful surprises - can you spot all 20 mischievous cats hiding in plain sight? Test your observation skills, take your time, and enjoy the satisfying thrill of discovering each well-hidden feline!

title: Labubu And Me
description: Play this fun game for girls where you style your own Labubu monster and yourself! Customize Labubu with fur colors, eyes, tops, stickers, and accessories. Then, match your makeup and outfits to create the ultimate twin look. From trendy dresses and cute bags to stylish hairstyles, show off your fashion skills and creativity. Perfect for fans of Labubu games and makeover fun!

title: JUMPER
description:
Bounce your way to record-breaking heights in JUMPER! Dodge epic traps, collect unique power-ups, and enjoy upgraded visuals as you climb higher and higher.

Unlock adorable skins and earn achievements as you master your jumps. Whether you're aiming for the top or just chilling, JUMPER offers a relaxing platform-hopping experience packed with charm.

title: Freecell Solitaire
description:
Put your mind to the test with FreeCell, one of the most beloved solitaire card games of all time!

Move cards between columns, use the free cells cleverly, and organize suits in ascending order to win.

Elegant graphics, smooth animations, and intuitive controls make every game a relaxing and satisfying experience.

Whether you're a solitaire veteran or a curious beginner, FreeCell will win you over with its perfect mix of simplicity and strategy.

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Panda Dash Auto Shooting
description: Jump straight into explosive action with Panda Dash Auto Shooting! In this fast-paced side-scrolling shooting adventure, you guide a fearless panda warrior into chaotic arenas packed with endless zombie waves. Each battle throws you into intense combat where survival depends on positioning and strategy. Every round feels stronger, faster, and more thrilling than the last! Get ready, grab your gear, and dash into zombie chaos!

title: Pogo Masters
description: Bounce into action in Pogo Masters! Race against rivals in chaotic, physics-based platform battles where balance is everything. Compete online against players worldwide or challenge a friend locally on the same PC. Unlock dozens of unique characters, stylish pogo sticks, and eye-catching trail effects as you climb the global leaderboard. Fast-paced, competitive, and endlessly fun — become the ultimate pogo champion!

title: Dynamons 11
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 11! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Guardian Island world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons connoisseur Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon Captain. Encounter Chyroax, Scorvenox, Axolotix, Uryndur, Skyvioru, Golunaryx and many more special Dynamons. Recruit them for your team and beat others in thrilling 1v1 battles with special attacks and power-ups.

title: Meme Mukbang ASMR Game
description: Welcome to Meme Mukbang ASMR Game, the ultimate livestream mukbang experience! Step into the world of a quirky mukbang streamer, where you’ll indulge in delicious dishes and share your mukbang ASMR moments with a growing audience. The more you eat and interact, the more you earn, all while building your fame in the livestream world!

title: Office Solitaire
description: Office Solitaire is the classic solitaire variant with the objective of collecting all the cards to the top row in suited sequences from ace to king.

title: Dino Simulator City Attack
description:
In the year 2024, not only are dinosaurs no longer seen, but they live peacefully with humans in the urban center. Not quite at peace, however!

Play as one of several prehistoric dinosaur species in this free 3D game where you may run, crush, demolish, leap, disturb, and do just about everything else you can imagine. Each level has its own set of objectives that you must accomplish in order to access the next. Picking your favorite dinosaur from the list of possible species is also an option.

title: Cow Jam Farm puzzle
description: In Cow Jam Farm Puzzle, the peaceful farm turns into a tricky traffic jam that only your logic skills can solve. Cows are stuck in crowded paths, and your mission is to help every one of them escape safely.

title: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue!
description: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue! is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game with lots of interesting puzzles. You will see several niches in it. They will be separated by partitions. In one niche you will see a fish, and in another water. You will need to carefully study everything and pull the pin. Thus, you will open it and water will get to the fish.

title: Roblox Christmas Dressup
description: Roblox Christmas Dressup is a delightful dress-up game where players embrace the festive spirit by customizing their avatars with Christmas-themed outfits and accessories. The game offers a wide variety of styles to explore, from cozy winter wear to glamorous holiday ensembles. Perfect for fashion enthusiasts and Roblox fans alike, Roblox Christmas Dressup brings creativity and joy to the holiday season.

title: Chibi Doll - Avatar Creator
description:
Street - it's no matter build your modern city life or just stick with village-like town world you always be enjoy with it! 

Room - decorate and design home girly world.

Gacha - unlock countless gachapon surprises your lovely avatar, bring gacha to your fantasy life! 

Dress Up Games - match and mix more than 5000+ girly items for dressing up princess: hairstyle, clothes, hats, accessories, freckles, moles, blush, wings, tails.

title: Imposter 3D
description: Brace yourself for a thrilling challenge! Tap the screen to release balls and guide them into the holes each round. Afterward, head to the store to snag upgrades and cool items to power up your game. Complete levels, gather diamonds, and unlock permanent upgrades to boost your progress. How far can you take your skills? The further you go, the greater the rewards!

title: Cryptogram
description:
This game is for people who do not just look at letters but see the meaning behind them.
Each phrase hides a thought that can be revealed if you use logic, intuition and persistence.

title: Flower Shop
description: Match 6 of the same flowers to ship them! You can place your flowers in any empty spot on the board. Place a flower next to a tray with the same kind to make them merge. When the right conditions are met, customers will come by to visit! Complete their requests to earn rewards. The game ends when there’s no more space left to place flowers.

title: Katana
description:
It's a first-person Katana game!
Slice all the enemy ninjas into small pieces and save the hostages. Use multiple katana swords and shurikens. Fight epic bosses and complete the levels.

title: Save the Bees
description: In "Save the Bee", you will play as a hero in the unique world of bees. Bee, the cute and necessary bee, is facing despair and your mission is to solve puzzles by drawing to the rescue. You will have to confront unpredictable threats that seem easy but are difficult but extremely attractive

title: Contract Deer Hunter
description: Step into the shoes of a skilled hunter in Contract Deer Hunter, an immersive 3D hunting game where precision and strategy are key. Accept challenging contracts to hunt wild animals in various environments, including dense forests and open plains. Your mission is to take down your targets with precision to earn cash rewards. The better your aim and the more vital the hit, the greater the payout!

title: Unpuzzle Master
description:
Unpuzzle master plan and execute your moves strategically to become the master, navigating through bottlenecks and utilizing “exit” strategies effectively.

Touch the tile to move it in the direction of the tile. Complete each level that really challenges your brain to think sharper.

Choose from a variety of themes and skins to customize your block-puzzle adventure. Each skin not only changes the visual aesthetic but also improves the way you interact with the puzzles, making every move count.

title: Farm Block
description: Farm Block is an engaging farm-themed puzzle game where players slide adorable animal blocks to free them from the farm. Test your strategic thinking and enjoy the charming countryside setting! With its mix of puzzle-solving and elimination mechanics, Farm Block offers a fun and rewarding challenge for all ages.

title: Ragdoll Show: Throw, Break and Destroy!
description: Dive into the chaotic fun of ragdoll mayhem! Navigate thrilling challenges by guiding your ragdoll character through each level, leveraging realistic physics for epic destruction. Sharpen your skills and unleash maximum chaos—can you conquer every challenge and emerge victorious?

title: Ultra Realistic BlockCraft
description: Help Steve in the ultra-realistic block world and make sure he reaches the portal. Remember, this realistic world is extremely challenging and monsters are roaming everywhere. You must collect all the diamonds. While collecting diamonds, don’t forget to open the chests you find along the way. Open the chests and crush all the monsters. Reach the portal at the end of the level safely to complete the stage. Remember, you only have one life and if it runs out you will lose everything you’ve earned.

title: Cargo Skates
description:
No obstacles, no matter how high, can stop me from collecting more goods.
Pass the obstacles and finally collect enough goods.
Now, your supermarket can open

title: Bus Driver
description: Being a bus driver is tough! Navigate carefully through traffic, pick up passengers, and avoid collisions. Think you have what it takes to master the roads?

title: Offroad Muddy Trucks
description: Embark on a great adventure with huge trucks featuring massive tires and bodies in the Offroad Muddy Trucks game! You can play in either the 1 or 2 player career mode or explore a vast free map with a friend. The game offers surprises and entertaining terrain for you to discover. Let the monster truck simulator begin on muddy ground and experience all the various terrains on the map.

title: Yoga Master
description:
Yoga is a great way to improve your quality of life. It is also a great way to entertain yourself in this game: Yoga Master.

Yoga Master is an addictive 3D running game with different levels that will challenge even the fastest reflex.

title: Zombie Rush
description:
Zombies Rush is a fast-paced top-down survival shooter that pits a lone survivor against an endless, evolving horde. Built for fluid action, this 2D arcade shooter, turns every escape into a high-stakes dance with death.
Tilt and weave through trees to outmaneuver the rush.
Each wave brings faster, smarter, and deadlier undead threats.
Experience a modern take on the classic zombie survival genre with clean, stylized graphics and kinetic combat.

title: Sudoku Guru - classic sudoku
description:
Develop your logic and train your brain in "Sudoku Guru - Classic Sudoku"!
Enjoy Sudoku, solve daily challenges and get trophies for completing tasks.

There are 5 different difficulty levels available to you: easy, medium, difficult, expert and guru. Each level is a unique puzzle.
Track your progress and challenge yourself with the statistics report. This feature adds a competitive element to the game, motivating you to become a real guru.

title: Bubble Pop Legend
description:
Bubble Pop Legend is the best way to kill time.
Aim & shoot to pop all colorful bubbles to clear the board and win coins.
You'll spend hours with fun & addictive Bubble Pop Legend to keep your mind active.

▶ How to Play

• Aim carefully and tap where you want to shoot
• Match 3 or more bubbles of same color to pop them
• Pop all colorful bubbles to win levels
• Use less shots to get higher score and earn 3 stars
• Plan and use epic boosters at the right time to BLAST ALL LEVELS

title: Country Life Meadows
description: Country Life Meadows is a farming adventure game where you turn a humble patch of land into a thriving estate. Cultivate crops, expand your business, and manage a skilled team.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Hidden Object Adventure
description: Are you ready to solve puzzles and uncover hidden secrets? Become a detective in Find Hidden Object Game and test your observation skills! Explore detailed scenes in schools, houses, amusement parks, and zoos. Search for cleverly hidden items, challenge your brain, and enjoy fun, relaxing gameplay. Perfect for casual players and puzzle lovers alike. Train your mind and become the ultimate detective!

title: Catch Thief
description: Catch Thief is an addictive puzzle game where you must outsmart a clever thief and stop his escape. Take control of the police, block every possible path and drive the criminal into a dead end. With each new level the challenge grows, requiring you to plan ahead, think strategically and act quickly. Bright cartoon graphics, fun scenarios and increasing difficulty make Catch Thief a perfect choice for fans of logic games who enjoy testing their skills, attention and reaction speed.

title: Bublix: Bubble Hit
description: Bublix: Bubble Hit is a fast-paced bubble shooter where precision and strategy matter. Aim, shoot, and match 3 or more bubbles to clear the board. Use clever angles, wall bounces, and combos to boost your score. With endless gameplay and rising difficulty, it’s perfect for quick, addictive sessions.

title: 2 Cars Run
description: 2 Cars Run is a dual racing game where you need to control the vehicle to avoid all obstacles. The difficulty of this game is that you have to control one car while taking care of the other. Well, are you ready to challenge this game now? Come on!

title: Lollipop Stack Run
description: Dive into a sweet adventure in Lollipop Stack Run which is a colorful parkour game! In this fun arcade game, keep running while collecting vibrant lollipops to stack your sweet tower. You need to be flexible and glide between various obstacles, making sure to collect as many lollipops as possible during the run.

title: Iconic Halloween Costumes
description: Get ready for a spooky and stylish adventure in Iconic Halloween Costumes! Help three BFFs pick out their perfect Halloween looks, from royal Glinda and Bridgerton-inspired outfits to edgy Beetlejuice vibes and cowgirl-chic styles. Customize their costumes with tops, bottoms, accessories, and makeup to create iconic Halloween outfits. Play now and let the fashion fun begin!

title: Mini Obby War Game
description:
Manage your little character and see him through the never-ending conflict in Mini Obby War Game, an action-packed 3D game set in a Roblox environment.

With over ten unique and challenging levels, this amazing game is within your reach. Keep sprinting to avoid being caught by the waves of enemy troops who will shoot you if they see you, and aim and fire at all adversaries.

As you defeat enemies, you'll find coins that may be used to unlock additional characters with unique abilities.

title: Solitaire Tail
description: Raise your dragons at Solitaire! Clear the game by moving all cards to the foundation! Move cards from the tableau or stockpile in ascending order of the same suit. In the tableau, you can stack cards in descending order with alternating colors! You can place a King card in an empty column! When there are no available moves, you can draw cards from the stockpile to the foundation or tableau!

title: Picture Puzzles
description: the picture puzzles includes dozens of different puzzles. you can increase or decrease the number of pieces of these puzzles as you wish. so you can make it suitable for all ages. you can have a pleasant time by having fun and exercising your brain. come on we are waiting for you.

title: Fashionista Christmas Eve Party
description: Indulge in the Fashionista Christmas Eve Party extravaganza! Discover glamorous holiday ensembles, festive accessories, and the perfect blend of chic for a stylish celebration. Join the fashion-forward festivities and elevate your Christmas Eve style to new heights. Unwrap the magic of the season with Fashionista, where every outfit is a statement and every moment is a fashion triumph. Let the glamour of Christmas Eve unfold.

title: Cute Coloring Games
description: Cute Coloring Games is a fun drawing coloring game. Filled with fun, colorful and creative drawing tools, coloring games help kids of all ages have fun creating art. Follow the prompts will draw and finish coloring it! Don't forget to share the success with your friends!

title: Wheel of Bingo
description:
Wheel of Bingo has two parts. Part 1: Spin the wheel to match bingo numbers. To help the player, colored marks are drawn on the wheel to indicate their bingo numbers. For every match, the player gains points and a colored ball to be used in part 2. For a complete bingo line, many extra balls are awarded.

Part 2: Drop balls to match colors in plinko. The point values shown at the bottom of the screen are base values, but are multiplied if there is a successful color match (GREEN MATCH X 5).

title: Jewelry Idle
description: What is the best jewelry? Of course, those made with your own hands! Create the best jewelry store! Design stunning pieces, attract discerning customers, and watch your business thrive in this sparkling venture!

title: Merge cubes 2048 3D
description: A completely new approach to the classic game 2048?! Now in 3D and with dynamic physics?! Number cubes don't just merge - they bounce and collide?, adding an element of surprise to every game! Compete with friends or colleagues?!

title: Horse Champs
description: Raise, train, and compete with your champion horse to secure first place in this thrilling horse racing simulation game. Strategize and master the art of competition.

title: Mr Bounce
description: Challenge yourself with Mr Bounce, the brain-boosting puzzle game that will test your thinking skills and reflexes. Each level is a new puzzle demanding strategic planning and precise execution. Mr Bounce is more than just a game; it's a mental workout that improves your cognitive abilities.

title: Vikings: An Archer's Journey
description: Vikings: An Archer’s Journey blends the fast-paced action of a shoot ’em up with the adrenaline rush of an infinite runner, all presented in a striking minimalist art style. Play as Nott, a fearless Valkyrie archer, on a quest to save her wolf, Oder, from the Underworld. Use intuitive controls, collect powerful upgrades, and team up with Viking heroes to face off against mythical Nordic creatures in this thrilling adventure.

title: Drawer Sort
description: Do you like a cluttered space exactly where everything has its place? It is time to organize your life and become a tidying hero, conquering chaos one drawer at a time.  Be sure to plan ahead for this epic puzzle or you may find yourself with a messier hand than when you started! Each brain training task will challenge you to place various items in the right places. You'll have to aim for perfect precision if you want to make sure the objects fit snugly and achieve the ultimate tidy victory.

title: Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
description:
Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
Swipe fruits, blast combos & solve hundreds of juicy match-3 puzzles! Fun for all ages with vibrant graphics, daily rewards, offline play & no time limits. ?? Perfect for quick play or long sessions. Match, crush & enjoy!

Play now and test your brain!

title: Wave Road 3D
description: Wave Road 3D is a fast-paced reflex game that challenges your focus, timing, and precision. You control a sleek arrow gliding through a floating road filled with gears, traps, and collectible gems. Whether you’re chasing high scores in endless mode, conquering 20 handcrafted levels in classic mode, or racing head-to-head with a friend in 2 player mode, Wave Road 3D offers a refreshing and dynamic experience.

title: Design With Me SuperHero Tutu Outfits
description: Welcome to Design With Me SuperHero Tutu Outfits. We all love superheroes very much! Likewise, our favorite princesses are inspired more by superhero tutu fashion. They planned to organize the fashion events under this theme. Join and help each princess to pick a suitable superhero tutu outfit. Play them and have fun!

title: Extreme Car Race Master 3D
description: Fine tune your ride, keep your foot on the gas, dodge the endlessly varied obstacles, and try to keep out the way of your equally manic rivals in super-fast, super-exciting, psychedelic races that always offer something new and unexpected. Feel the need for speed?

title: Football Legends 2026
description: Football Legends 2026 is a fast-paced arcade soccer game where you can play solo or challenge your friends in exciting 1v1 and 2v2 matches. Choose from a variety of unique players, each with special abilities like powerful superkicks or teleportation, and use them to outplay your opponents. Compete in tournaments, master your timing and strategy, and score incredible goals to become the ultimate soccer champion

title: Horseback Survival
description: Embark on a journey of survival in "Horseback Survival," where you, as Zohan, share an unbreakable connection with your horse, Badal. Born on the same day, your unique bond becomes a lifeline when a mysterious event leaves you in a coma. Navigate a zombie-infested world. Engage in intense combat with melee and ranged attacks, outsmart the undead by staying stealthy, and overcome obstacles with strategic running and jumping.

title: Find the Frog - Hidden Objects
description: Go on a relaxing and magical adventure in Find the Frog - Hidden Objects. In this charming hidden object game, you’ll explore beautifully hand-drawn black-and-white scenes and try to spot frogs hiding in plain sight. With each click or tap, the world around you lights up in color, revealing hidden surprises and playful details. Play for free on both mobile and desktop, unlock new levels, and collect unique frogs from all around the world.

title: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games
description: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games challenges your problem-solving skills in a captivating pin puzzle adventure. Strategically tap to unlock screw holes on products, guiding metal plates to fall in the correct sequence. Navigate through intricate mazes of nuts, bolts, and plates. With each level presenting new challenges, immerse yourself in over 100 brain-teasing stages.

title: Minecraft Pixel Warfare
description: Minecraft Pixel Warfare" is a fast-paced PvP shooter set in blocky, Minecraft-inspired worlds. Players battle in competitive team modes (e.g., Team Deathmatch, Capture the Flag) or free-for-all arenas using guns, grenades, and melee weapons—all with Minecraft’s iconic pixelated visuals. Unlock skins, upgrade weapons, and master maps to dominate the leaderboard!

title: Sword Run 3D
description: Sword Run 3D is an easy to pick up action runner game. Collect sword pieces, cut off the obstacles that block your progress, and finally reach the finish line to win. More cool skins are waiting for you to unlock, what are you waiting for? Don't forget to share it with your friends if it's fun!

title: Frogtastic Marble Adventure
description:
Get ready to dive into a world of colors and adrenaline with Frogtastic, the puzzle game that will keep you glued to the screen! Jump into the adventure and save your world from the invasion of colorful spheres by combining strategy and lightning-fast reflexes!

Endless fun! Whether you have a few minutes for a quick game or want to dive into long gaming sessions, Frogtastic is perfect for you.

Play now and experience a puzzle game you won’t forget!

title: Meow Market
description: In Meow Market, players take on the role of a charming white tabby cat running a bustling vegetable shop. To keep the business thriving, players must harvest fresh veggies by engaging in a click-match puzzle game. Selecting grouped matching vegetables to harvest them efficiently. Each harvest consumes one move, which regenerates over time, encouraging strategic decision-making.

title: Lucky Brainrot Blocks Online
description: Lucky Brainrot Blocks Online game takes the familiar lucky box idea and turns it into a more active risk-and-return loop. You move through 14 areas, open boxes, collect brainrots, and decide whether to head back safely or keep pushing for rarer finds. Online play is available through 1 Player mode, while local 2-player adds a same-screen option for faster, more chaotic sessions. Rebirth, speed upgrades, better boxes, base expansion, and roaming bosses keep every run moving forward.

title: Bubble Game 3D
description: Get ready for bubble-popping fun in Bubble Game 3D, a super cool version of the original classic Bubble Shooter game, now with amazing 3D graphics. Aim, match, and pop colorful bubbles in a world that looks like it’s coming right out of the screen. This is Bubble Shooter 3D like you’ve never seen before!

title: Happy Blocks
description: Play Happy Blocks free online and jump into a colorful browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Arrange and clear blocks in a satisfying logic puzzle that feels like a smart brain game for all ages. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for easy, addictive puzzle fun anytime.

title: Brain Challenge
description:
This game will challenge your mind, think out of the box
Unexpected and mind-blowing answers will amaze you
250 Fun levels.

Features:
- Solve fun & mind-challenging puzzles
- Think out of the box
- Simple & addictive gameplay

** Credits:
"Ukulele"
"Royalty Free Music from Bensound"

"Forest" & "calm-bgm"
Music by "BandCamp - syncopika"

Menu vector created by jcomp - www.freepik.com
Menu vector created by upklyak - www.freepik.com

title: Horror Forest Bear
description: Imagine an angry bear that has escaped from its cave in the forest. It's very hungry and wants to eat honey. You must help the bear. The bear is starving, and it needs to eat all the honey. You need to be very careful—it's a dark and dangerous forest, full of traps and hunters. The hunters have become much stronger because they can shoot with guns now. You must avoid the hunters. Escape from them, collect all the honey, and return to the bear's cave.

title: CarJamcolor
description:
There was a long queue of passengers at the public station platform with a "car jam" in the parking lot! what to do?

Now it's time for the cars to transport passengers, you need to move them...but wait! You need to do it in the right order. Because other cars in the parking lot that become an obstacle! Can you solve this tricky parking puzzle and get all the cars on the road?
what are you waiting for? Challenge your brain with this tricky game now!

title: Doomsday Zombie TD
description: Doomsday Zombie TD is a cool and exciting tower defense game. You aim to defend your castle from brutal enemy attacks and take down the zombie army. Depending on your defense strategy, you can upgrade your buildings, towers, arsenal, and army. Lead your army to defend the castle and kill the zombie hordes. Enjoy!

title: Battleship
description: Battleship is a classic strategy game where you compete against an enemy to sink their fleet of ships. Each player places their ships on a hidden grid and takes turns guessing the locations of the opponent’s ships. The first player to sink all of the enemy’s ships wins the game. It’s a test of strategy, memory, and luck!

title: Popcat Clicker
description:
Popcat Clicker is a fun idle clicker game where you tap a cute cat to earn coins, unlock upgrades, boost your income, and progress through different levels. 
The more you tap, the faster your cat grows and the more rewards you earn.
Simple, addictive and perfect for all ages!

title: Superhero Drop and Save
description: Our Super Hero is ready to save the hostages captured by the bad guys. To destroy the bad guys, jump on them and neutralize them by firing small explosions. Act carefully to avoid damaging the hostages from the explosions. You can unlocked new hero skins from the market section with the money you earn. As the levels progress, the tasks will become more difficult, but you can overcome them.

title: Ramp Bike Jumping
description: Perform the most unimaginable stunts on motorcycles, bicycles, even skis! There’s no backbone to be broken here! And we know a guy who knows a guy, whose sister-in-law bent some laws of physics for us. That’s right, you can get really crazy with our game. So buckle up, or not... It doesn’t matter. The only thing that matters is pure fun and madness!! YEE-HAW!

title: Capybara Block Drop
description:
Capybara Block Drop is a fast-paced, brain-teasing puzzle game where merging numbers and staying calm under pressure is the key to survival.

Drop numbered blocks into columns, combine matching tiles, and clear space with big combos.
But watch out, if the board fills up, it’s game over, and your capybara buddy might just lose his cool!

With colorful visuals and satisfying number-merging mechanics, Capybara Block Drop delivers endless strategic fun wrapped in a charming, lighthearted package.

title: Boo-tiful Princess Match
description: Welcome to an exciting puzzle-game, created in a Halloween atmosphere. There are three princesses in the game and each one is ready for her own eerily beautiful transformation. The player will have to look for paired cards to discover new elements of the girls future image. Each successful match brings you closer to creating a unique costume, makeup or hairstyle. Only the most attentive players will be able to make their princesses truly scary-beautiful!

title: Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon
description: Get spooky and stylish in Wednesday Addams Beauty Salon, where gothic meets glam in a 3-level makeover game. Treat Wednesday to a facial, apply stunning dark-themed makeup, and finish off with iconic dress-up fashion in her unique style. From skincare to eyeliner, you control every detail of her transformation. Whether you’re a fan of the Addams aesthetic or just love alternative beauty, this salon experience offers a complete glow-up from head to toe.

title: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator
description: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator is a 3D strategy battle game where planning is the key to victory. Build your army of Swordsmen, Spearmen, and Archers, analyze enemy formations, and lead your ninja forces to triumph across challenging levels.

title: Animal in Rails!
description:
An exciting puzzle game about delivering animals to a trader's base

Connect and disconnect railways around the world to help each animal reach its home.

Install, remove, and redirect connections so that wagons can safely connect to the locomotive. But be careful and don't let them collide with each other!

Delay trains by using railway barriers. Change the tracks to redirect the wagons in different directions. Pick up new pets along the way and face even more challenges along the way!

title: Snowboard Game​ Party
description: Begin snow racing thrill in Snowboard Game Party. It's a high-energy multiplayer ski sport challenge. In this adrenaline-filled winter sports game, you’ll join other players on dynamic ski tracks full of surprises. Flexibly control your hero and race against other opponents. While keeping your speed! Avoid snowballs, fences, sudden slopes, etc. Win races to earn points, unlock gear, and customize your style!

title: Clap Clap Nightmare
description: Clap Clap is a short indie horror game that puts you in the shoes of a house sitter, experiencing strange occurrences in a seemingly ordinary home.

title: Athena Match
description: Embark on a mythical journey in Athena Match, a Match 3 game set in Ancient Greece. Guided by the goddess Athena, match three or more identical artifacts to clear levels and uncover Greek secrets. Stunning visuals and rich soundscapes bring this world to life as you solve puzzles and overcome mythical obstacles inspired by Greek lore. Ready to prove your skills? Join Athena and dive into the adventure!

title: Soft Girls Winter Aesthetics
description: Hop on a plane and spend your winter vacation traveling around the world together with your favorite princesses. Discover fun winter activities and practice your fashion advisor skills while helping them choose their outfits of the day in the Soft Girls Winter Aesthetics for girls! Have a blast!

title: Stickboys Hook
description: Swing with Stickboys and jump your way to the finish line. Stickboys needs your help. Assist him and reach the goal! Jump from launch ramps and shoot webs to get to the end. You must complete every level. Be careful — if you fall from the sky, you lose the game.

title: Destination Brain Test
description: Destination Brain Test is a great puzzle game to text your brain. You only need to drag to launch the ball to destroy all the blocks with various shapes. The farther you go, the more difficult levels you will meet. Luckily, you can try countless times in this game. So, try to challenge it now!

title: DON'T PANIC DUDE!
description:
Meet DUDE, a sassy AI who thinks you can't beat his game! Trapped in his chaotic simulation, your goal is simple: Jump, avoid deadly spikes, and survive to prove him wrong.

Features:

Fast-paced endless jumping action.

Unlock 40 unique and funny heroes.

Hilarious AI commentary and memes.

Increasing speed and difficulty.

Can you handle the chaos? Don't panic, just jump!

title: Candy Pop Mania
description:
Dive into the enchanting world of matching games - Candy Pop Mania - where delightful fun and challenging games await! Pop, blast and match 3 sweets to keep on the adventure! Use combos and reach the best results!
Challenge yourself to win all of the levels of Candy Pop Mania!

title: Ship Parking Game
description: Solve colorful passenger seating puzzles on ships in this unique traffic jam puzzle game. Help passengers find their seats based on color patterns while managing the flow of people through parking lot-style challenges. It's not just about parking - you're a traffic director managing passenger jams on the high seas.

title: Smash the Car to Pieces!
description: Shoot the car with guns. Launch a combat drone or summon a tornado. Ram the car with a giant hammer or blow up all the windows with dynamite. There are many ways to destroy a car waiting for you in this game.

title: Block Master - Super Puzzle
description: Welcome to a unique puzzle game where logic and strategy decide everything! Experience a fresh take on classic block games! The pieces appear at the bottom, and it’s up to you to decide where to place them. Drag the blocks onto the field, fill horizontal and vertical lines, and clear space for new moves. Every action requires careful planning—can you score the highest points?

title: Road Chase. Shooter Realistic Guns
description:
Shoot the enemies chasing you!
Break away from the chase, your AK47 will help you with this!
Huge selection of realistic weapons
AK47, Minigun, Crossbow, Stationary gun, Machine gun
Destroy motorcycles, ATVs, racing cars, helicopters
Realistic graphics

title: Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire
description: Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire is the classic one lower one higher solitaire you know and love. It sounds easy: just remove cards from the board one higher or lower than the next card in the deck. But there's a whole other world behind these simple rules! The constantly changing locations and new cards on the board will keep you on your toes using new strategies. Don't expect to be an expert if you don't play for a couple weeks!

title: Construction Truck: Building Games for Kids
description: A vibrant and engaging construction game where kids can build houses, drive vehicles, and explore a world of fun activities. With easy-to-follow instructions, children learn new words, develop skills, and enjoy creative play in a safe, interactive environment.

title: Ships 3D IO
description: Ships 3D is an IO game, multiplayer sailing ship simulator. The game is played in 'first person' where you control the sailor and move around the ship; interacting with the helm, sails and cannons. Sink enemy ships and shoot other players to score points.

title: Mecha Duel
description:
Crazy about robot fighting games? Wanna fight robots on the mech arena? This Mecha Duel game will not let you down. Your robot has to defeat real steel enemies in a mech arena. It’s hard to survive.
Upgrade your hero to defeat war robots. Unleash fighting attacks in one-on-one robot battle with simple gameplay.

title: Boom Stick Bazooka
description:
In Boom Stick Bazooka, an explosive online game where you may customize your bazooka and smash platforms and opposing stickmen, you're in for a wild ride. The black stickmen are stationed in towers, and if you pause for even a second, they'll open fire, attempting to wipe off your three lives.

In each level, you'll have three chances to aim and fire; you may always try again or purchase more ammo. If you want to kill foes quickly, blow up the barrels so they explode and knock down the towers.

title: SCP 173 Escape
description: Step into the role of SCP-173 and break free from the Foundation’s control in a tense stealth experience built around a deadly rule: you can MOVE only when no one is LOOKING at you. Hide in the shadows, avoid patrols, and choose the perfect moment to dash through dark corridors where every mistake leads to capture.

title: Basket Sport Stars
description: A great basket challenge begins with random characters and with random basketball arenas with the Basket Sport Stars game! Play single or 2 player! The game consists of many levels, characters, and various game modes like Tournament, Quick Matches, 2 player Matches, and Practice Matches. You can play any of these modes for free, without unlocking. Pick most of the characters for free and start shooting your opponent's basket hoop!

title: Twinkle Shooter
description: Shoot at stones of the same color to drop them. They can be cleared when three or more of the same color are matched. If a stone enters the heart, the slot spins for a fever chance! The game is over if the stones reach the bottom.

title: Obby Highest Jump Ever
description:
Obby Highest Jump Ever is a click-based jumping and climbing game where every click makes you stronger. Start from a small 10M building and push your way up to massive 2500M towers as your jump power grows step by step. Each new height feels like a new milestone, and every rooftop trophy proves you earned it.

Your goal is simple: jump higher, reach the top, and collect trophies. The higher the building, the bigger the reward.

title: Tile Sort - Match 3
description: Tile Sort - Match 3 is an addictive match-3 puzzle game where your task is to sort and match identical tiles on the board. The game combines classic match-3 gameplay with elements of sorting, adding an extra layer of strategy and logic. Move tiles, creating combinations of three or more identical tiles to clear the board.

title: Spellmind
description:
Welcome to Spellmind Magic School where wonderful adventures await! Solve match-3 puzzles to restore the old mansion to former glory. Beat colorful levels, explore magic mist-filled rooms, decorate them to your taste and solve the mysteries of the missing wizard’s mansion!
Show that you’ve got what it takes to restore the Spellmind Magic School to its former glory!  Build wonderful interiors for Sabrina’s story to take place in.

title: Merge Run Battle
description: Merge Runner is an exciting merge game where you combine power and speed to win every challenge. Play a merge runner game with fun arcade merge game mechanics like those in cool math games or reminiscent of roblox and minecraft thrills. Upgrade heroes in an idle merge game and fight in a merge battle game. This merge and run game blends strategy and fast-paced action—perfect for fans of snake game challenges or quick kahoot-style fun.

title: Falling Blocks Puzzle
description: Falling Blocks Puzzle is a timeless puzzle game where players arrange falling geometric shapes, to form complete horizontal lines. As lines are completed, they disappear, and players earn points. The game ends when the stack of shapes reaches the top of the screen. It’s a test of strategy and quick thinking, beloved by gamers worldwide.

title: Guess The Drawing
description: This is a casual puzzle game where you draw and I guess. Maybe you've played a game like that before, where someone draws on your back and you draw on the front, and then you see if you agree. If you like that kind of game, then this game is for you. In this game, you need to memorize what the person behind you draws.You can use the coins you get to buy the brushes you need. Come and experience this new and interesting game world.

title: TRIVIA NATION
description:
Test your knowledge with quick and fun trivia questions!

Play through multiple categories including sports, movies, history, science, and more.
Challenge yourself in fast-paced quiz rounds and improve your brain skills.

Perfect for all ages — play solo or compete with friends and family!

• 400+ questions
• Multiple categories
• Fast and addictive gameplay
• Multilingual support

title: Traffic Escape Puzzle
description: Come to enter a complex maze in the Traffic Escape Puzzle! In this exciting puzzle game, get your car out safely. Find the right time to exit the vehicle. Be careful to avoid traffic jams and collisions. To slide the vehicle and create a clear path for cars. Each level presents a new traffic maze. And traffic flows become more and more complex. Come to use your ingenuity and strategize. Cleverly arrange all cars on a complex maze of roads.

title: Glossy Bubbles Challenge
description:
Dive into our bubble shooter! Burst bubbles, match colors, and rack up points in this addictive arcade game.

In the Glossy Bubbles Challenge, you'll encounter an incredibly colorful interface! The simple game mechanics combined with precise aiming create an atmosphere of complete control. Your task is to pop as many bubbles as possible with a single shot to achieve a high score. The ability to react quickly is crucial because the bubbles are relentlessly approaching!

title: Real Cars Epic Stunts
description:
Flashy and modified super-sports cars and their drivers are ready for the show in Real Cars Epic Stunts game. Play against time in dozens of different stunt tracks and try to complete the show. Unlock new cars or upgrade your car with the coins and diamonds you collect.

Game Features:

● Realistic car physics and appearance. ( Cars get crushed and smashed )
● Upgradeable cars
● 1 Player and 2 Player modes
● Mega ramps for epic stunts

title: Zombie Horde: Build & Survive
description: Step into the chaos of Zombie Horde: Build & Survive, a free online game where your survival depends on smart defenses and sharp shooting. Play on your phone or computer as you fight off endless waves of the undead. Set up turrets, lay traps, and build barricades to hold the line while unleashing powerful weapons. In this post-apocalyptic world, every second counts—can you keep the horde at bay?

title: Phone Case DIY Run
description: Phone Case DIY Run is a very fun simulation game. What type of phone case do you have now? If you are interested in making a phone case, then come and join us to learn about the process! Collect the models, choose your favorite color for painting, then paste the picture and choose the pendant. Finally, the more phone cases you collect when you reach the end, the more money you get. Have fun!

title: BFF Easter Photobooth Party
description: Step into the whimsical world of the “BFF Easter Photobooth Party” and celebrate the joyous holiday with your best friends! Join in on the festive fun as you dress up in vibrant Easter-themed outfits, pose for adorable photos in the photobooth, and create lasting memories together. With colorful props, festive decorations, and endless laughter, this is the perfect way to capture the spirit of Easter and enjoy a delightful day with your BFFs.

title: Buckshot Roulette
description: Do you dare to bet your life on an exciting roulette wheel showdown? Buckshot Roulette is a gun simulator that combines strategy, shooting and survival. Instead of a pistol, a powerful shotgun was used. Every pull of the trigger is a choice of fate. The winner lives, the loser dies. You will begin a Turn-Based shooting roulette game. Each round will have a fixed number of bullets and blanks.

title: Fire And Water Birds
description: Try to get the water and fire birds through challenging obstacles to get the highest score and become the master of the birds. a challenging adventure awaits you. Come on!

title: Jewel Garden Story
description: Enter a dazzling realm where sparkling jewels await your matching skills. Challenge yourself to achieve high scores and enjoy the visually stunning jewel combinations. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts seeking endless entertainment.

title: Airport Security
description: Airport Security is a casual simulation game that immerses you in the high-stakes world of airport safety, placing you in the role of a vigilant security officer dedicated to safeguarding a bustling terminal. Your mission is to maintain a secure environment by identifying suspicious passengers, spotting fake passports, and uncovering hidden contraband using cutting-edge X-ray machines.

title: Labubu Adventure
description:
Dive into a world of Labubu characters. If you are looking for an amazing adventure, help the little Labubu to complete all the levels and collect coins through the fantasy world.
Whether you want to elevate your gaming skills or just look for simple fun, you can always find something that fits your type.

title: Save The Piggies
description: Save The Piggies is a car-moving game. But this time you are moving not a car, but a pig or other animal. From a few pigs to a large group of pigs, you need to click on the pigs to move forward until all the pigs are there. The pig must be successfully removed to pass the level.  Have fun!

title: Bubble Pop Fairyland
description:
Bubble Pop Fairyland is an exciting bubble shooter game that’s very highly addictive!
Aim, shoot & pop all the color bubbles using epic blasters to clear the board and win coins!

Bubble Pop Fairyland is a fun and relaxing puzzle game designed to keep your mind sharp at any age.
It also is a perfect brain training and fast solution making game
You will have hours of fun shooting & matching the same colored bubbles!

title: Doodle Dino Run
description: Doodle Dino Run delivers an addictive running adventure where you control a cute dinosaur, avoid dangers, and push your distance record farther every time you play. Featuring smooth side-scrolling gameplay, precise jump timing is essential to survive. Packed with action, this dinosaur adventure challenges your reflexes as the speed continuously increases.

title: Hospital Inc
description: Step into the fast-paced world of Hospital Inc, an exciting management simulator. This addictive idle tycoon casual game lets you build, expand, and manage your own hospital while earning profits even when you're away.

title: Princess vs Shark
description:
Dive into a magical underwater world with “Princess vs Shark”!
Game Features:
	•	Engaging Gameplay: Solve puzzles, guide water flows, and help the princess overcome obstacles.
	•	Beautiful Graphics: Immerse yourself in the enchanting underwater world.
	•	Challenging Levels: Each level gets harder and more thrilling!
	•	Easy Controls: Simple and intuitive controls make it accessible for everyone.

title: Reach 2048
description: The classic 2048 puzzle — slide numbered tiles on a grid, merge them, and reach the legendary 2048 tile! Simple to learn, impossible to put down. Challenge your brain with this addictive number puzzle. Plan your moves carefully, build combos, and aim for the highest score. How far can you go beyond 2048?

title: Barbee Met Gala Transformation
description: Barbee and her friends have a big night ahead—the Met Gala! It’s your job to help each of them get dressed up and feel amazing. Whether someone’s into bold colors or classic glam, you get to style their look from head to toe and make sure they’re ready to walk the red carpet.

title: Worm Escape
description:
Worm Escape is a fun puzzle game that tests your logic and decision-making skills. Move worms in the correct order to clear each level. A single right move can solve the puzzle, while a wrong one can block your progress.

As you advance, levels become more complex with tighter spaces and more worms. Analyze carefully and choose the right sequence to succeed.

Simple tap controls make it easy to play, but mastering each level requires planning and strategy.

title: Ragdoll Jump
description: Welcome to Ragdoll Jump! In this exciting jumping game, you will control a lovable stickman character on a thrilling journey out of a building. You will experience the sensation of soaring high as you jump and glide through the air, creating spectacular action sequences. Get ready for hilarious falls, and remember that you won't always land safely.

title: Avatar Master - Fix Up Face
description: Creative and unique puzzle. Fix your avatar's face. Collect all the puzzles of beautiful characters. Avatars from anime to Vikings from cute girls to tough knights. Have a fun and train your brain, memory and logic. Meditative and relaxing game play.

title: Run Now
description: Dive into Run Now, where each step is a puzzle waiting to be solved! This game offers a unique blend of creative challenges, quirky humor, and addictive gameplay. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers alike, Run Now invites you to test your skills in a world filled with unexpected obstacles and entertaining surprises.

title: Meow Slide
