description: Meow Slide is a brain training puzzle, entertain your brain for minutes or hours with endless challenges. The Meow Slide puzzle is simple: slide blocks left or right to create and clear full lines.

title: Wired Chicken Inc
description: Wired Chicken Inc is a fun casual game on yad.com. Do you dream of being a relaxed and free farmer and managing your farm? In this game, you can realize your dreams. At the beginning of the game, you only have one duck egg. The duck egg hatches a duckling, and the duckling then produces a duck egg. See what you can get in the last, enjoy!

title: Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments
description: Welcome to a small humorous adventure in which you will try on the role of a stylist for the most mysterious lady of all time - Mona Lisa Gioconda. Connect the past and the present by mocking trends and memes. Each of your changes is a small work of art, and each outfit immediately causes fireworks of pleasant emotions. There is no framework here - only freedom of expression. And the variety of images is guaranteed to make your time in the game unforgettable!

title: Crazy Alien Adventure
description: Crazy Alien Adventure is an addictive and exciting game. You will play as a brave character who runs, jumps, and dashes through various worlds, collecting stars and power-ups along the way. Your goal is to rescue the animals that are trapped in cages by smashing the wooden stakes with your rush power. The more you run, the more points you get. You can also use the stars to buy items and outfits. Discover different kinds of animals in the game and try to save them all. How far can you go?

title: Stickman Team Detroit
description:
It's team time now! Cartoon character The game of Team Detroit is fun to watch. A gang of robbers is threatening the city of Detroit, but three little stick figures will come together to stop them.

Take pleasure in killing off enemy stickmen while using any of the three playable characters. Because of their unique abilities and weaponry, each playable character is tailor-made for their specific role.

title: Your dream room
description:
Do you dream of creating the perfect room? 
In this game you will become a real interior designer! 
Have fun, experiment and turn an empty space into a cozy dream corner.
Choose wallpaper, flooring and furniture in different styles. Decorate the room with stylish accessories, add coziness!
Choose the color scheme and arrange items as you like.
Experiment with design, create unique interiors and enjoy the process!
Start creating your dream room now!

title: Battle Zone 2D
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic 2D top-down shooter. Fight on a vast map, search for weapons, ammo, and gear to survive epic battles. Use strategy, cover, and tactics to become the last survivor. Simple controls, fast-paced matches, and thrilling gameplay make the game accessible to everyone. Test your skills, defeat enemies, and prove that you are the best fighter!

title: Fruit Merge Arena
description: Fruit Merge Arena is a fun and relaxing game where you drop fruits and merge the same ones to create bigger fruits. Keep merging step by step and try to reach the ultimate fruit — the watermelon! But be careful, space is limited and the board can fill up quickly. Plan your moves wisely and keep merging to stay in the game.Feeling stuck or running out of space? Don’t worry! You can watch a reward ad to remove all instances of a selected fruit and make room for new moves.

title: Bloons Survival.io
description:
Bloons Survival. io is a fast-paced survival arcade game where you fight off endless waves of balloons!

Control your monkey hero, throw darts automatically, and pop incoming enemies before they get too close.
Collect coins and power-ups to grow stronger, but stay alert — one hit can end your run!

How long can you survive?

title: Kitty Match 3 puzzle game
description:
Kitty Match is a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game with adorable cats. Match tiles, create combos, and clear levels in a relaxing and colorful world.

Easy to play and perfect for all ages. Enjoy smooth gameplay and endless puzzle fun.

Start your cute cat adventure now!

title: Farm Mahjong 3D
description: Have you ever imagined playing your favorite 3D mahjong game in a farm setting? Mahjong 3D Farm does just that! It brings the popular Mahjong 3D game into the charming world of farms, filled with adorable animals, crops, and farming tools for you to match! So why wait? Play Mahjong 3D Farm Connect now and solve the puzzle amidst the fields!

title: Ludo Star
description: Enter the arena of strategy and chance! Choose your favorite mode, unlock stylish dice skins and climb the trophy road. Outsmart opponents, master your moves and prove you’ve got what it takes to rule the board and become a Ludo Star.

title: Fish Shooting Fish Hunter
description: Want to begin a fun and relaxing fishing adventure? In Fish Shooting - Fish Hunter, you’ll become a fishing master. Use your skills and quick reflexes to catch various fish while enjoying a laid-back casual experience!

title: Dalgona Master
description:
Welcome to Dalgona Master, a thrilling game for those who loves dalgona, honeycomb, cookie game, and dalgona challenges.

This engaging sweet game challenge invites you to carve delicate shapes out of honeycomb candy, immersing you in the delicate skill required to perfect each piece without breaking it.

title: Kitty Squad Winter Dress Up
description: Step into the adorable world of Kitty Squad Winter Dress Up, where you can style your kitty for the winter season! Choose from cozy outfits, cute accessories, and festive winter gear to create the perfect look for your furry friend. With its charming graphics and endless customization options, this game is perfect for fashion lovers and cat enthusiasts alike. Start dressing up your kitty today!

title: Stunt Rider
description: In this exciting game, you will take on the role of an experienced stuntman, performing daring stunts on your motorcycle at different levels. Unlock new levels and buy cool motorcycles in the Stunt Rider game.

title: Super Ninja Balloon
description:
Aim your sharp Ninja Shurikens and pop as many Balloons as possible in fun and exciting puzzle challenges. Create amazing combos, hit tricky shots, and clear each level with fast reflexes and smart moves.
Every victory takes you further into a colorful balloon-popping adventure filled with cheerful worlds, playful action, and satisfying explosions. Unlock new challenges, enjoy vibrant visuals, and become the Super Ninja Balloon master.

title: Infinite Craft
description: This is a crafting game in which you start with four elements - Fire, Earth, Water, and Wind. Combine elements to create new elements. Find bizarre and fun combos. Enjoy an open and stress-free exploration experience.

title: Vortex Ball
description: Roll through an ever-changing, vibrant tunnel filled with deadly obstacles and tricky hurdles. Test your reflexes as you dodge, weave, and survive as long as you can in this fast-paced infinite runner. Collect gems along the way and unlock 27 unique balls from the shop. With only 2 balls to start, every gem counts. The tunnel never ends, the colors keep shifting, and the challenge only gets harder. How far can you go? Compete for the highest score and prove your skills!

title: Gun War Z1
description:
The world is in danger, a deadly virus affects more and more territories, turning people into zombies.

Clean up locations and save people

title: Steal Car Duel
description:
Step into a high-energy world of engines, rivalry, and fast reflexes. Steal Car Duel is a competitive action game that evolves the idea of Steal a Brainrot into a car-based experience filled with duels, rare collectibles, and endless upgrades!

Race, collide, and steal your way to the top. Build your own garage, earn coins and tickets, and outsmart rivals to prove who rules the arena. Each match combines skill, timing, and strategy as you fight for dominance in Solo or 2 Player mode.

title: Office Knight 3D: Castle Defense
description:
Office Warrior: Wield swords and axes as skillfully as a stapler!
Action Battles: Fight various enemies in dynamic 3D environments.
Progression System: Level up, improve health and damage right in the heat of battle.
Weapon & Upgrade Shop: Collect coins to buy hero upgrades and equip yourself.
Endless Challenge: Deflect waves of enemies and prove you are the ultimate defender!

title: Sworded.io - Spin and Rub.
description: Test your skills in the game – an arcade simulator of sword fights! Fight waves of enemies, upgrade your character, unlock powerful weapons and magic spells. Demonstrate your tactics and reaction in dynamic battles!

title: K-Pop Hunter Fashion
description: Unleash your creativity in K-Pop Hunter Fashion, a unique dress up game where trendy K-Pop meets gothic demon hunter vibes. Style glamorous idols in bold K-Pop looks while blending them with dark, fantasy-inspired outfits. From leather jackets and spiked boots to neon hair, glowing makeup, and mystical accessories—you’ll create fierce, otherworldly fashion statements.

title: THE KULKA
description:
THE KULKA is a one-button bullet-heaven arcade game where your single shot evolves into chaos. Inspired by Flappy Birds, Vampire Survivor and Pattern Survivors: Bullet Hell. 

MUTATE YOUR BULLET. FLAP, EVOLVE, SURVIVE.

title: Ride Shooter
description: What if the whole world is filled with zombies? Of course get in a car, equip it with weapons and armor, and then break through to the others! What's next? Machine gun, laser and attack helicopter!

title: GMOD Bombs
description:
Experience the power of a high-tech laser cannon in the GMOD Bombs! Collect bombs, create cities, and aim to destroy objects on the map and enjoy spectacular explosions.
GMOD Bombs is an exciting game where you take on the role of a bombardier armed with a futuristic laser cannon. Your task is to collect bombs and strategically destroy various objects and structures on the map. Each bomb has a unique flight trajectory and blast radius, which requires precision and aiming skills.

title: Strawberry Shortcake
description: Strawberry Shortcake has big dreams. She wants to be the BEST baker that Big Apple City  has ever seen and that's why she packed her bags and went to live with her Aunt Praline to the only place where a baker can go if they want to become the best in the whole world: the BIG APPLE CITY!

title: Goal Rush
description:
Goal Rush is a fast-paced neon football showdown where precision and quick reflexes lead to victory! Play solo against a challenging AI or compete in thrilling 1v1 battles with a friend.

With dynamic arenas, tricky obstacles, and intense goal-scoring action, every match feels fresh and exciting. Outsmart your opponent, master the controls, and dominate the field in this minimal yet action-packed football experience!

Are you ready to take on the challenge and score the ultimate goal?

title: Secrets of Charmland
description:
● Unique gameplay: help Emma treat her friends by swapping and matching delicious sweets!
● Tons of match-3 levels filled with exciting elements, awesome boosters and explosive combinations!
● A world full of Charmland: discover all the magical places it has to offer!
● Fantastic characters: watch Emma making new acquaintances and helping them with their unusual quests.

title: Save My Pet Party
description: Cute pets need protection, would you like to help them? Draw protection walls for bees coming from different locations in each level and stop them. In levels you find difficult, you can get hints or skip the level directly. You can play Save My Pet Party game in 1 Player or 2 Player modes.

title: Noob: parkour tricks
description:
Welcome to Noob: Parkour tricks!

This is a runner and timekiller in the minecraft universe about the adventures of Noob. Do parkour tricks and complete challenges.

Monster School kicked out Noob, and Herobrine turned him into a Gigachad!

Game Features:
- Run through the village with trials.
- Do parkour tricks.
- Complete challenges and avoid traps.
- Collect diamonds.
- Unlock new skins.

title: I Am Security
description: Have you ever wanted to be a hardened security officer and be on the front lines of maintaining order? In I Am Security, an ultra-realistic role-playing simulator, you play the role of a professional security guard. You decide whether or not to allow them to enter. Some guests may try to sneak in with prohibited items and find these hidden items. Performs tasks in a variety of scenarios to identify suspicious persons.

title: Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo
description: Welcome to Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo, a unique and immersive game that lets you unleash your inner tattoo artist. This isn't just any game; it's your gateway to a world where art meets relaxation, and where your creativity can truly shine. Prepare to immerse yourself in the satisfying and intricate process of tattooing, all at the tip of your fingers!

title: Obby Rainbow Tower
description: Obby Rainbow Tower is a fast, winter-themed tower race where every second and every jump matters. Each floor is packed with moving platforms, icy tiles, spinning lava bars, surprise snowstorms and snowball portals that try to knock you into the void.  You can replay the tower as many times as you like, trying to beat your own best time or racing a friend side by side in 2 player mode.

title: Golf Orbit
description:
One shot golf simulator is the battle of golf rivals to become the golf king worldwide. Become part of this idle golf orbit rocket league in which balls go high to Mars. Smash the ball to mars and become the golf champions.

Oneshot Golf Orbit is golf offline game which has many golf rocket leagues and one shot golf battles. Be part Mars golf games to become champions of golfing over it.

title: Elementz
description: ElementZ is a Match-3 game similar to Bejeweled or Candy Crush. Its particularity lies in giving each color its elemental power, allowing you to trigger different powers of fire (red), water (blue), earth (brown), plants (green), and electricity (yellow).

title: Cat Evolution
description:
Embark on a paws-itively thrilling journey of discovery and creativity in Cat Evolution! Combine adorable cats to unlock hilarious and surprising new species. From cuddly kittens to fantastical hybrids, every merge brings you closer to unveiling the ultimate evolution.

Merge & Unlock Cats Evolutions. 
Build Your Cat Universe!

title: Monster School 2
description: Monsters from minecraft are trained at the monster school by Herobrin's teacher. Take the tests, find out who is a Noob and who is a real pro in Bottle Flip challenge, parkour and roller coaster!

title: CANDY LOVE
description: Let's erase the same candies by matching 3 or more of them! You can take a candy from the tapped row and put it on the tapped row. The game ends when the candy reaches the bottom.

title: Animal Merge Zoo Park
description:
Animal Merge Zoo Park is a fun and addictive idle zoo simulation game where you build, manage, and expand your very own wildlife empire. Start with a small zoo and grow it into a world filled with animals, wild beasts, dinosaurs, monsters, and magical creatures like unicorns. Become the ultimate zoo tycoon by merging creatures, caring for animals, producing food, managing visitors, and unlocking new zones.
Merge Animals and Discover New Species

title: Lovely Cat Pet Life
description: Call for all pet lovers! If you are a DIY enthusiast or enjoy playing with cute animals, join Lovely Cat: Pet Life, a casual DIY cat game online. Dive into this adorable, fun-filled, and creative game that combines the elements of cats, pets, fashion, and DIY all in one perfect package! Play dress-up game: Try out charming suits on your pet. Decorate an ideal look for your kitten. Enjoy minigames unblocked: Join mini animal parkour games with your little cat.

title: Obby Blox Hook
description: Obby Blox Hook is an addictive physics-based platformer where players control the Roblox players swinging through levels using a grappling hook. With smooth animations, challenging obstacles, and fun physics mechanics, the game tests your timing and precision as you swing from one point to another, avoiding obstacles and making daring jumps to reach the finish line.

title: Wordler
description:
It's the same English word guessing game as Hackman I played when I was young.
You are given six chances to guess a word that consists of only five letters.
How many times can you get it right?

title: Fashion Dye Pro
description: Fashion Dye Pro is a fun-filled shirt DIY game. Follow the hottest summer trends! Tie-dye summer clothing and beach accessories! Show off your creative skills by customizing tie-dye outfits to your liking. Get requests from customers and paint garments at will. Being creative isn't hard: first tie it up, then dye it! Unleash your DIY art cells and leave everything to the dye! Get high this summer! Come join us!

title: Battle of Pirate Caribbean Battle
description: Battle of Pirate: Caribbean Battle is an action-packed war game where you command a mighty pirate ship and engage in thrilling naval battles! Prepare for an epic battle war game as you sail through the Caribbean seas, fighting rival pirates, enemy warships, and legendary sea monsters. Use powerful cannons, guns, and strategic combat to conquer the ocean and become the ultimate pirate captain!

title: Emoji Match
description: the emoji match includes dozens of different emojis. you can increase or decrease the number of pieces of these puzzles as you wish. so you can make it suitable for all ages. you can have a pleasant time by having fun and exercising your brain. come on we are waiting for you.

title: Shape Shift
description:
Shape Shift is a fast-paced arcade game set in colorful outer space. Pilot your spaceship through a field of moving geometric shapes and collect the correct targets to score points.

But stay sharp, the target shape or color constantly changes. One moment you must collect blue circles, the next moment it might switch to red triangles. Grab the right shapes and avoid the wrong ones as long as you can!

title: Vex Hyper Dash
description:
Get ready for a fast-paced challenge in this brand-new Vex spin-off: Vex Hyper Dash! Inspired by the legendary Geometry Dash. Your goal is simple: survive as long as possible. Jump from platform to platform, time your moves perfectly, and avoid the countless dangers that stand in your way. One wrong move, one mistimed jump, and it’s game over. 

Vex Hyper Dash puts your reflexes and precision to the ultimate test. Can you master the flow and set a new high score?

title: Food Tower Defense
description: ? Welcome to Food Tower Defense – The Tastiest Tower Defense Ever! ?? Prepare your appetite and sharpen your strategy because Food Tower Defense is here to serve you the most delicious tower defense experience ever!

title: Monster Truck Crush
description: Monster Truck Crush is a skillful balanced monster truck racing arcade game. With 3D monster trucks, you need to defeat the AI opponent by arriving at the finish line in the first place. You can speed up immediately when your vehicle is balanced on the next platform. Or else, you will lose some speed or roll the truck. The AI opponent is good at controlling the speed. But you can control the body angle of the car to keep speeding up. Good luck!

title: Obby: Pogo Parkour!
description: Obby: Pogo Parkour! is a dynamic arcade game where you control a character on a pogo stick, overcoming various levels filled with obstacles. Buy and upgrade your pogo sticks to complete challenges faster and more efficiently. Compete with players from all around the world and aim for the top of the leaderboard. Dive into the thrilling world of parkour on a pogo stick and test your reflexes in Obby: Pogo Parkour!

title: Geometry Wave Hero
description: Geometry Wave Hero is an exciting rhythm-based game that takes players on a thrilling journey through a vibrant color world. This game offers a unique twist on the classic Geometry Dash formula, focusing exclusively on the wave game mode. Players must navigate their wave through a series of challenging obstacles, using simple one-touch mechanics to control its movement.

title: Mega Jump
description: Mega Jump is a fast-paced vertical arcade game where you leap from platform to platform, collect coins, and dodge hazards as you climb higher. Power-ups, shifting coins, and colorful boost stars keep every ascent exciting. With vibrant visuals and responsive movement, the challenge grows as you push for your highest score without missing a single platform.

title: Math Wall Simulator
description: Combine brainpower and action in this math-based Roblox adventure! Solve equations to break through walls, collect coins, and unlock new challenges. Progress through 20 classes of increasing difficulty, from basic arithmetic to extreme math puzzles

title: Obby Champions
description: A journey awaits you where every wall is a challenge, every obstacle is an ancient seal, and every punch is a step towards legend. Explore unique zones, fight titans, and find rare pets with unique abilities. Enter hidden codes, collect fragments of history, and leave your mark in the Hall of Echoes - only the strongest will be able to break all the seals and become the Fist of Legends!

title: Robot Transform Race
description: Robot Transform Race is a running arcade game that is made of collecting, avoiding, and transforming elements. With 3D transformable robots, you need to win each race by collecting useful items, avoiding obstacles, and slowing down the other robots. Mostly you can strike and slow down the other robots nearby. Collect missiles to attach the advanced robots behind you. Don't forget to design your robot rather than buying a provided skin.

title: GT Championship Arcade
description: Get ready to ignite your engines and experience the ultimate rush of speed in GT Championship Arcade! This fast-paced, adrenaline-fueled racing game brings the excitement of GT racing into a visually stunning, arcade-style world filled with neon-lit tracks, intense rivalries, and heart-pounding action. Whether you’re a casual gamer looking for quick thrills or a hardcore racing fan seeking the ultimate challenge, this game offers an electrifying experience like no other.

title: Fall Bean 2
description: Fall Bean 2 invites you to a colorful, fun-filled world of races! In this chaotic platform game, your goal is to be the last one standing by outmaneuvering other players. Jump, roll, and leave your opponents behind on challenging courses. Overcome new obstacles in each round to reach the final and claim victory! Compete with friends or players from around the world in non-stop action. Join Fall Bean 2 now and enjoy the excitement!

title: Obby +1 Pet Every Seconds
description:
Are you ready to become the owner of the coolest pet collection? Merge them, upgrade buildings and open new islands!

The game offers you:
- A constant influx of new pets - collect, merge and open rare ones!
- Upgrade your lab, market and home for even more opportunities
- Sell pets, earn money and build your empire

Open all the islands, pump up your pets to the maximum and create your own pet empire in "Obby +1 Pet Every Second"!

title: Tic Tac Toe - Match Three
description:
Rediscover the classic game of Tic-Tac-Toe (XO) like never before with "Tic Tac Toe: Match Three"! Immerse yourself in this timeless board and strategy game that's been masterfully reimagined to offer new puzzles, exciting challenges, stunning graphics, and endless fun for players of all ages. Whether you're looking for a quick game to sharpen your brain or a comprehensive puzzle game experience, our game has something for everyone.

title: ChickZ Stack
description:
ChickZ Stack is a fun and addictive arcade game where flying chickens take to the sky! stack your chickens to overcome obstacles and glide through colorful, challenging levels.

The taller your chicken stack, the easier it is to pass walls, traps, and enemies.

Unlock adorable flying chickens, explore new worlds, and compete for high scores.

With simple one-tap controls and fast-paced gameplay, ChickZ Stack is easy to play but hard to master.

Stack, fly, and flap your way to victory!

Eliminate enemy troops and destroy their military bases. Upgrade your aircraft with deadly weapons and cool gear. Dominate the battlefield from the sky and defeat the villain general in a final airstrike!

description: World Cup Soccer Caps is a fun and fast-paced tabletop-style soccer game where you control a team of caps, flicking them to pass, shoot, and score goals. Strategize your moves, outplay your opponent, and aim for victory in this exciting, skill-based challenge!

description: It's time to serve a delicious Ramen! Ask grandma for the recipe. Prepare the tools and gather the ingredients. Mix the ingredients perfectly, then decorate the Ramen. Keep following grandma's instructions to finish making the Ramen! Don't forget to dress up in various cute costumes. Making Ramen has never been more fun!

description: Immerse yourself in "Word Puzzle," a premium brain-teasing game featuring a stunning 3D animated background! description: Piece together a paradise in Mojicon Garden Jigsaw Solitaire! Solve beautiful puzzles to restore a dry meadow back to a lush, blooming garden. Enjoy a meditative experience with smooth controls and the iconic Mojicon art style. Can you bring the garden back to life?

description: In Holiday Hex Sort, drag and drop hex tile stacks onto the board. Merge tiles to form stacks of 10 and collect them. As levels progress, more tile types appear. If there are 10 similar tiles on a stack, they will be collected. Clear all tiles by making stacks of 10 before time runs out !

title: Fun Town Parking
description: Funtown Parking is an exciting parking simulation game where you must follow paths and park in designated spots while avoiding obstacles and challenges. As the levels progress, the routes become more complex, testing your precision and driving skills. Can you navigate through the chaos and park without a scratch? Take on the challenge and master every level!

description: Welcome to Cinema Empire Idle Tycoon! Do you dream of owning your own movie theater empire? Now's your chance! Join the fearless explorer Aria as she uncovers hidden treasures, ancient relics, and precious gems buried in the jungle. Match colorful stones and nature-themed items, solve fun and challenging puzzles, and unlock secrets along the way. Take part in Daily and Weekly Challenges, enjoy Daily Surprises, and progress through hundreds of exciting levels in this unforgettable jungle adventure.

description: Embark on an exciting adventure with an addictive puzzle game that will challenge your mind and soothe your soul. Immerse yourself in a world of bright colours and intricate Russian matryoshka dolls as you complete tasks to clear the field and become a true matryoshka doll master.

description: Relax and challenge your brain with Space Pin Master! Enjoy satisfying pull pin puzzles in a space adventure full of gravity-based fun. Free the balls, avoid bombs and obstacles to fill the spaceship. Spin to win coins and unlock new balls, pins, spaceships, and themes. In this game, you manage your own food court, sorting various food items into their respective categories. You'll encounter different eateries, from fast-food joints to upscale restaurants, each requiring you to sort items like burgers,
sushi, hotdog, fries, pizza and desserts. The game features colorful graphics and quick, satisfying levels that keep you engaged as you expand your food

description: Navigate the bubbles to the exit without getting popped by the spikes. More the bubbles escape, more the scores you get. Play through 30 levels. Be careful with the bubble jiggles.

Dot By Dot is a relaxing puzzle game where you have to connect dots into lines and get amazing drawings. Once you connect all the dots and lines, the drawing will be automatically colored! Enjoy the addictive puzzle game!
Let the Dot by Dot game develop your creativity and skills. Draw a line, connect colored dots and see what kind of drawing you get.

description: In this fun and challenging puzzle platform game, test your strategic thinking as you navigate through levels where flipping platforms is the key to survival! Your goal is to collect bullets and hunt ducks. Also use various power-ups such as Explosives, rockets and special hammers to create bigger explosions and go faster. Have Fun!

description: Ninja Spell Match is a fast-paced blend of match-3 puzzling and ninja action. Connect tiles to charge up your attacks and unleash devastating moves against waves of enemies. Play as Uncle Bullet, a retired spy who’s back in the game to take down rival agents and save the day. Armed with an arsenal of bouncy bullets, you’ll use your wits and quick reflexes to outmaneuver foes and rescue hostages.

To do this, players must shoot and collect all the scattered diamonds while avoiding or eliminating dangerous enemies along the way. Have fun!

Take down The Fish, then return safely to the starting point. But remember, only Humans of the same color can defeat The Fish! Experience exciting levels with increasing challenges, stunning 3D visuals, unique characters, and easy-to-learn controls for all ages.
Enjoy the adventure!

title: Beat Music Battle
description: Step into the world of Beat Music Battle: 456 Survival, where rhythm meets creativity and fun! This casual music game is perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and party lovers alike.

title: Count Master Match Color Run
description: Count Master: Match Color Run is a colorful running game where you lead a group of little characters in a color-matching race! In this exciting arcade challenge, collect characters of the same color to grow your team. Merge them for a bigger squad, aiming for the highest score. Avoid hammers, spikes, etc. Collect characters of the same color to expand your team.

title: Practice On Me
description: Get ready for a glamorous summer adventure with Practice On Me, the ultimate makeup game! Transform into a festival goddess, beach babe, or blooming flower child in three exciting themed units. Grab your brushes, swipe on lipstick, and let your inner artist shine. Dance at festivals, relax by the beach or embrace nature's beauty. With Practice On Me, the possibilities are endless. Make waves, channel your inner mermaid, and bloom like a flower. Experience a summer adventure like no other!

title: Save my Hero
description:
Players may enjoy a unique gaming experience in Save my Hero Online, an engaging puzzle game that revolves on drawing lines. You take on the role of a superhero under assault from missiles in the game. It is your responsibility to create lines to stop these projectiles and shield the hero.

Finish every level and attempt to rescue the superheroes, such as Iron Man, Batman, Spider-Man, and so on.

title: Stunt Fury
description: Stunt Fury takes adrenaline-fueled stunts to new heights in this action-packed gaming experience. Strap in and prepare to defy gravity as you showcase your skills on a variety of daring platforms. With heart-pounding excitement around every corner, this game challenges players to push the limits of physics and creativity.

title: Meme Wars
description: MeMe Wars is a strategy battler with US-style Shanhaijing flair. Build a quirky hero lineup with unique roles and stats. Place them on the board for max power, adapt to new foes each stage, and win.

title: Arrow Wave
description: Explore a world where a wave moves through various obstacles, overcoming challenges along the way. Test your reaction and perseverance!

title: Politon
description: Politon is a turn-based strategy game with easy-to-understand mechanics and satisfying visuals. If you want to test your strategical logic against enemies of different numbers and difficulty levels, Politon offers a variety of hex-based maps with various terrains. You'll need to manage your economy while expanding your territories and defend your region against rival invasions.

title: Lost Puppy Rescue and Care
description: Welcome to Lost Puppy Rescue and Care. A small pup is lost in the rain, cold and alone. He’s not sure who to trust—but with your care, that starts to change. Gently clean him up, feed him, and help him feel safe again. This calm, story-like game is all about kindness, connection, and giving one little dog a second chance.

title: Classic Mine Sweeper
description: Dive back into "Mine Sweeper Classic," the ultimate nostalgic puzzle game from the Windows XP era, perfect for strategic gameplay during any downtime. Challenge yourself with levels from beginner to expert and relive the excitement of this timeless classic.

title: Relay Race
description: Relay race game is an engaging and addictive game that combines puzzle solving elements, casual gameplay and exciting race challenges. This game offers players a unique combination of fun puzzles and trolls for a thrilling and engaging gaming experience.

title: Bears vs. Art
description:
Bears vs. Art is the premium version of the slash em’ up puzzle game you love! Exclusive to this version of Bears vs. Art - enjoy uninterrupted, thought-provoking puzzles.
Each painting is protected by sneaky security measures including lasers, spikes and mind-bending portals. Not to mention snooty guests, nosy security guards and art-snatching thieves!

title: Merge Drop
description: Buy and merge balls. Drop them to break the cubes. Every ball will multiply when they touch the cubes. If your balls can reach the end of the level you win.

title: Tap Bead
description: Tap Bead is a relaxing puzzle game. Arrange beads by color to match patterns and clear levels. Simple controls, soft visuals, and many levels make it a soothing, satisfying experience.

title: Vibrant Hearts Glamour vs Punk
description: Two best girlfriends, Lily and Roxana, are striking opposites. Lily is the personification of tenderness and romance, dressed in airy pink dresses decorated with sequins and floral patterns. Roxanne is the true queen of punk rock, with her black leather dresses, gothic earrings and bold hairstyles. But do not forget about the third girlfriend, Melody, who masterfully combines both styles. Players will be able to experiment with outfits and choose which one is best suited for Valentine's Day!

title: Ultimate Transport Driving Sim
description: The realistic and enjoyable driving characteristics of Ultimate automobile Driving Simulator combine to make it the best automobile driving simulator for mobile devices. The best driving physics are found in the best vehicle driving simulator! All types of vehicles, from off-road SUVs to race automobiles, have their unique physics!

title: Sky Balls 3D
description: Sky Balls 3D invites you on an adventure as you travel through the sky with rolling balls and test your reaction skills. Keep the ball on the track without letting it fall and watch out for obstacles, traps and gaps! Collect coins and keys along the way to get new ball skins and sky-boxes. You can play the game in 1 player and 2 player modes.

title: Gun Fest
description: Gun Fest is a free online shooting game for boys played on PuzzleGame. Of course, a lot of running elements are added to the game. In the process of playing, you not only have to choose the right door to fight against the enemy but also have to avoid many obstacles to reach the end. It will greatly test your skills and reaction ability. Play on Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop with us!

title: Superhero Phone Simulator
description: Explore action-packed mini-games, customize your hero, and test your skills in fun challenges. Whether you enjoy racing, creativity, or exciting adventures, this app has everything you need for endless fun!

title: Grill Party
description: Welcome to Grill Party! Step into the exciting world of grilling and become a master at crafting tasty skewers! In Grill Party!, you’ll experience a thrilling match-3 puzzle game where you’ll arrange meats, seafood, and veggies to create perfect combos. Serve up mouthwatering treats and show off your grilling skills!

title: Bouncing Chick
description: In Bouncing Chick you have to reach your nest as fast as you can, avoiding obstacles and hazards. Go to the top of the level and try to beat your record! There are 24 levels to beat, so what are you waiting for? Start your climbing to the top!

title: Animal Transform Race
description: Animal Transform Race is a fun game based on reaction where different types of animals compete. Each animal is fast in some areas and very slow in some tracks according to their abilities. Try to lead the race by making the right choices. The faster you make animal choices, the more advantages you gain. You can unlock new animals from the market section with the coins you earn from the races.

title: Brawl Bros Squad
description: Introducing a new exciting third-person shooter — Brawl Bros Squad! Fight opponents in a variety of conditions. Discover a variety of unique skins to make yourself unique. Enjoy dynamic jumps, accurate shooting and get ready for intense battles. Become a real champion among players around the world and prove that you are the best in this crazy world!

title: Party Games Mini Shooter Battle
description: Party Games: Mini Shooter Battle is a battle-royale shoot-em-up game with 2D cartoon models. In 4 modes, you can shoot other players to earn scores for coins and gems. Then you can buy more roles and guns in the Shop. Your character can aim at the closest target automatically so that you only need to fire and dodge bullets from enemies. More kills and less death will make you claim more coin and gem rewards. Good luck!

title: Headleg Dash Parkour
description: Touch controls have never been easier and more accurate! Run, jump, and climb walls just by tapping anywhere on. Pass the obstacles and raise the flag to complete the level. Difficult levels will make you addicted and feel challenged. complete all levels and try to unlock cute and cool skins

title: Space Survival Rainbow Friends Monster
description: Begin a fun battle like never before in Space Survival - Rainbow Friends Monster! You’re in a mysterious space station overrun by terrifying rainbow monsters. Your task is to escape and rescue your friends. Use your gun to begin the battle. Avoid enemy attacks and unleash shooting combos against waves of enemies.

title: Fishing Life
description: Fishing Life—a relaxing clicker game with 2D cartoon visuals. Choose your target fish, click the water to reel it in, and manage its energy. Prioritize upgrading Strength first. Skins enhance tap strength, outfits boost damage, and Keepnet nets extra prices. Assistants increase Income, Strength, Damage, and Price. Open chests and claim cash from charged drift bottles. Luck might grant you treasure chests—open them for valuable assistants!

title: Trial Xtreme
description: Trial Xtreme is an exciting game in which you have to get a new experience from driving a motorcycle. Experience a sea of adrenaline while riding a motorcycle and passing 30 levels with dizzying and spectacular obstacles.

title: Rope Sorting
description:
In the game “Rope Sorting” you are waiting for exciting puzzles, where you need to sort the ropes. Pass an infinite number of levels, collect stars, use aids, be the first!

Rollback actions - allows you to return to the previous step to take a different path.

Adding a coil - makes it easier to pass a level by adding another empty coil.

title: Dear Island
description:
Collect two blocks that match the color of the Match Slot to clear them!
Clear them all to finish the stage!
Blocks of different colors can be placed in the Stock.
If the Stock gets full, it’s game over!

title: Jungle Solitaire
description: Jungle Spider Solitaire is an adaptation of the classic card game Spider Solitaire with a jungle theme. It is optimized for short games and encourages strategic planning of moves with an original system of collecting diamonds.

title: Celebrity Spring Fashion Trends
description: Welcome to Celebrity Spring Fashion Trends. Hello little girls. Are you ready for the latest spring fashion collection? Follow the latest fashion trends with these celebrities and create your own fashion clothes for next spring season. Browse their wardrobe to pick suitable outfits and costumes. Join and help them to welcome their favorite season.

title: Diamondz
description: DiamondZ is a special variant of Match-3. Here, the goal is not to directly manipulate jewels on the board but to insert them on the left or right side to eliminate groups and make diamonds fall into the mine carts. Help the little miner collect as much wealth as possible!

title: Unlock the Bolts
description: Unlock the Bolts is a challenging puzzle game where you carefully remove screws to solve mechanical puzzles. Each level tests your logic and precision as you figure out the correct order to unlock the bolts. In special levels, the stakes are even higher—you must free trapped animals by unlocking the right bolts! With satisfying mechanics and engaging challenges, this game will keep you thinking and entertained. Can you master every puzzle and rescue the animals in need?

title: SquidGame.io
description: Engage in free multiplayer survival! Compete in 7-minute minigames against 30 rivals. Based on the hit Netflix show, test your skills and strategy. Fail a challenge, get eliminated by Pink Soldiers! Adapt and outmaneuver to survive. Will you be the last one standing?

title: Math Lava: Tower Race
description: Test your math skills under pressure in Math Lava: Tower Race, a fast-paced Roblox style web game where quick thinking and accurate answers are your keys to survival. Answer math questions correctly to build blocks beneath you, racing against opponents and rising lava. The faster and more accurate you are, the higher you climb!

title: Jailbreak. Roblox jumper
description: In this thrilling game with a cubic style, the character attempts to escape from prison by progressing through levels, each represented as a separate platform. On each level, you'll need to collect coins that help speed up your escape, but be careful: dangerous traps and obstacles await at every turn. A wrong move or misstep could cost you your life. Navigate through each level, avoid the threats, and move closer to freedom!

title: GT Cars Mega Ramps
description: Exotic cars, mega ramps, colorful giant bosses and face to face races all come together in this game. GT Cars Mega Ramps invites you to a fantastic driving experience with its completely unique game-play. Fly over mega ramps with your customized exotic car, destroy giant bosses or try to finish the stages first in face to face races!

title: Mermaids Spot The Differences
description: Dive into an enchanting underwater world with "Mermaids: Spot The Differences"! Explore vibrant ocean scenes teeming with mermaids and sea creatures as you sharpen your observation skills to uncover subtle distinctions. Immerse yourself in the magic of the deep blue and embark on an adventure of keen-eyed discovery!

title: Police Car Line Driving
description: Police Car Line Driving is a cool and addictive 3D car-avoiding arcade game. You have to chase unauthorized vehicles and drive as far as you can for higher score records. Each vehicle will give you an extra 100 scores right away. You have to dodge the bombs, other vehicles will do the same. If you hit them, you will lose the game immediately. Your current score and best score will be shown on the settlement page. If you want to improve your current score, you can restart and try again.

title: Shape-Shifting
description: Choose different vehicles to adapt to various terrains, allowing yourself to navigate through the terrain faster and become the first in the race.

title: Bubble Sky
description: Bubble Sky is an ascending Bubble Shooter game that will take you to dizzying heights. Will you be able to reach space? Reach a score of 200000 points to unlock the wheel of fortune and win collectible cards to complete your album!

title: Fun Obby Extreme
description:
Are you ready to experience an extreme game Fun Obby Extreme is a 3D parkour type game, little Obby needs you to help him jump across the platforms and reach the goal of each level.

Explore a sprawling city, level up and unlock new equipment, all while honing your parkour skills along the way!

title: Pet Runner
description: Pet Runner is a fast-paced platformer where your pet runs forward automatically, and you must jump, dodge obstacles, defeat enemies, and collect coins. Play in Endless Mode for infinite fun or tackle unique challenges in Level Mode. Use up to three lives, hit checkpoints, and complete daily challenges to earn coins. Unlock and customize adorable pets in the shop to enhance your adventure. With its exciting gameplay and charming rewards, Pet Runner offers fun for all ages!

title: Disk Rush
description: Disk Rush is a reaction-based arcade game where players must quickly sort colored disks into their matching zones. The game challenges your speed and accuracy as disks appear faster over time. With simple tap mechanics and increasing difficulty, Disk Rush tests your ability to think and act quickly under pressure.

title: Pin Detective
description:
Welcome to Pin Detective - Mystery Mansion!
A rich woman mysteriously vanished in a lavish mansion that was covered by the rumors of ghosts and dangerous monsters. A talented detective is committed to uncovering the mystery.
By pulling the pin, you can collect clues that enlighten the truth. What happens to the billionaire? Why do the biological laboratory and so many alien animals exist in this mansion? Let’s use your brain to solve the puzzle to find it out.

title: World Flags Trivia
description: Challenge your geography skills in World Flags Trivia! Identify the nation for each flag from three choices across 194 questions. Perfect your skills as you progress through increasingly tricky questions. Can you score a perfect game and become a true flag expert? Play now and find out!

title: Cyber Monday
description: Cyberpunk Monday thrusts you into a neon-drenched arcade cyberpunk adventure. Hack terminals, dodge digital foes, and race across futuristic CityGrid zones. Look for combos, outsmart AI, and collect cyber credits in this fast-paced hacking runner. Perfect for fans of cyberpunk games, arcade game thrills, free mobile games, and even cool math games that students love. Gear up—your Monday just got cyber.

title: Airways Maze
description:
This is an Airway game. You have to create the path/airway to move the plane from left to right without colliding any blocks. When you complete the level then unlock the next level. You have 100 levels now. But I will add more levels every 100 downloads.
Enjoy!

title: Merge Miner
description: Merge Miner is a fun and relaxing idle merge game where you build your own mining empire!Buy mining blades, merge them to create stronger tools, and place them into active mining slots to earn coins automatically.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Brilliant Jewels
description: Brilliant Jewels is a Match 3 game where you can either play against the time or try to pass levels with limited amount of moves. If you are feeling confident, you can also challenge the hard mode on the time attack mode. This game doesn't lack any sparkle!

title: L.O.L. Surprise Game Zone
description: Hi, B.B.s, welcome to the big city of L.O.L. Surprise! where you will visit the coolest shops, full of games and surprises.

title: SNAKES
description: SNAKES is a modern puzzle game that combines strategy and spatial reasoning. Players guide multiple snakes across a grid, filling every empty tile to complete each level. With clear visuals and intuitive mechanics, the game offers a relaxing yet challenging experience that sharpens logical thinking. Each level introduces unique layouts and obstacles, ensuring variety and depth as players advance.

title: Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour
description: Step into the absurd universe of Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour, where chaos, memes, and tricky obstacle runs collide! Pick your favorite Brainrot characters, master wild parkour tracks, and survive each hilarious stage with your reflexes and timing.

title: Xiblba Match
description: Xiblba Match Seasons 1 is one of the new Match 3 games from the creators of the SIDM GAMES STUDIO, Xiblba Match Seasons. The most beautiful Xiblba Match. The second sequel features a BIG content update with new levels and a relaxing soundtrack to enjoy!

title: Cat Football
description: Enter the adorable world of Cat Football, where cute felines don caps and engage in soccer madness! Score goals using a ball of blue thread against cardboard box goals. Compete with friends or challenge a skilled computer opponent in time-limited matches filled with frantic fun!

title: Domino Smash 3D
description: Domino Smash 3D is a free online puzzle game for boys played on a puzzle game. You will control a ball to rush to dominoes, knocking all domino cards down. The game uses unique physics to operate, just pay attention to avoid obstacles, and unlock brand-new Domino on different levels. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Are you ready for the challenge?

title: Papas Burger Cook
description:
Cook and travel through amazing burger restaurants, discover delicious recipes, prepare tasty meals, and serve hungry customers in the best burger shop.
This is a crazy cooking game full of fast kitchen action, burger fever, and food madness. Papas Burger Cook - fun cooking simulation game.
Become the ultimate burger chef, master every recipe, and reach the highest rank in this exciting food cooking adventure.

title: Witch Craft Potion Sort
description: Step into the witch’s lair this Halloween night and test your skills in a spooky potion puzzle! Sort the eerie liquids, mix glowing brews, and fill each cauldron with the right color to complete your craft.

title: Fill The Bottle
description:
Fill The Bottle is a puzzle online game for all ages. The design of the canisters is different at each level, which makes you think about how to get the ball in the limited space without crossing
the line. Test your skill in maneuvering the balls and pass the levels with increasing difficulty.This fun and addictive game will keep you hooked as you come
up with clever ways to place the balls and unlock all the levels!

title: Ragdoll Mega Dunk
description:
Welcome to the Ragdoll Mega Dunk indoor extreme basketball club! The game is a cool Ragdoll style basketball simulator .
Every attempt to do a trick will be unique! Throw the ball into the basket and fly there yourself!

title: Kings and Queens Match 2
description: Kings and Queens Match 2 is one of the most anticipated Match 3 sequels! This long-awaited second chapter features 2,500+ incredible levels full of magic and adventure. Join Princess Bella on a magical adventure, matching jewels and crowns to uncover hidden treasures. Create powerful boosters like Royal Bombs, hammers, and arrows to clear obstacles and win big. Stunning graphics and an enchanting soundtrack bring the kingdom to life. Get ready for a royal journey full of fun and surprises!

title: Mission Santa: Deliver the Gifts
description:
Santa must deliver gifts to children in time! There are many kids and only one Santa, so everything has to be done on the fly! Fly in a sleigh on Christmas night and throw gifts down chimneys to make children happy. 

The game helps you feel the atmosphere of the approaching holiday and prepare for the most magical time of the year!

title: Sprunki Phase Brainrot
description: Sprunki Phase Brainrot is a chaotic and hilarious reskin of the original Sprunki game, now powered by Italian Brainrot energy! Play as absurd meme legends like Tralalero Tralala, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Frigo Camelo, La Vaca Saturno, Lirili Larila, Burbaloni Luliloli, and many more. Run, jump, and lose your mind through surreal levels packed with brainrot humor, crazy visuals, and unpredictable madness. Enjoy custom sound effects and music that match each character’s bizarre personality!

title: Backgammon Online
description: Backgammon Online is a casual game adapted from the original board game for online players. This is a game of logic that allows you to play the classic and ancient board game of backgammon against other players worldwide.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Ragdoll Mania
description: Step into the world of Ragdoll mania : Mini games, where fun games meet ragdoll games! This is the ultimate experience for anyone looking to combine funny games with stress relief games

title: Bullet Heroes
description:
Join the ultimate team-based shooting game! Team up with players worldwide to strategize, outsmart, and dominate your enemies. Experience intense firefights on stunning high-definition 3D maps, with multiple game modes and a vast arsenal of weapons. Become an elite agent, master your skills, and lead your team to victory.
Dive into the action and enjoy the thrill of cooperative gameplay. 
Are you ready to become a hero?

title: Stickman vs Zombies: Epic Fight
description:
The zombie apocalypse has begun today!

Stickman vs Zombies: Epic Fight is an epic stick fighting game with cool effects and combos in the platformer genre.

The most epic battles and fights await you in a cube world similar to minecraft, where the red stick fights against zombies, skeleton archers, withers and even Noob!

The game is similar to Stick War, Stickman vs Zombies and Stickman Warriors. Hordes of zombies attacked the red stick and his friends!

title: Lorenzo the Runner
description: Lorenzo the Runner is a 2D Mario-like platformer that takes you on an exhilarating adventure through a vibrant cityscape The game features 4 levels set in 3 distinct environments. Bounce through the levels with slick controls and face a variety of enemies!

title: Block Up
description: Block Up Contrast is a minimalist arcade game where you need a moving block upward through an endless series of obstacles. The challenge is to avoid barriers of contrasting colors while collecting points. The game requires precise timing and quick reflexes as the speed increases. With simple yet engaging gameplay, Block Up Contrast offers an addictive experience for players.

title: Idle Pop Merge
description: Get ready for endless fun in Idle Pop Merge! Drag and drop characters into the slots to merge them into stronger versions. The more you merge, the more powerful your team becomes. It's a simple, addictive game that anyone can enjoy—whether you’re on desktop or mobile. Perfect for players who love puzzle challenges with a strategic twist!

title: Magic Flow
description: Magci Flow are puzzle series solved by transferring liquids. Players must strategically use container capacities to sort liquids in the fewest moves. Tasks include merging same-colored liquids or precise sequencing, rigorously testing judgment skills.

title: Beauty puzzle
description: A puzzle game in which you need to connect the pieces in a line. To successfully complete the game, it is important to use its mechanics to your advantage

title: Push The Frog
description: Control your little frog to eat all the mosquitoes. Master the length of the frog's tongue and make the frog reach the appropriate position to eat the mosquitoes. Think carefully about planning the route. The game has a simple and interesting style, and the gameplay is educational and novel. It is very suitable for playing when killing time.

title: Stickman Kombat 2D
description: Adrenaline unleashed! Rage, speed, and chaos collide in explosive 2D battles. Feel every hit — and dive into the madness. Are you ready?

title: Car Escape
description: Car Escape Game is an addictive and challenging puzzle game. It will help you train your brain. The operation of the game is very simple, move the horizontally parked cars to the left and right, move the vertically parked cars up and down, and finally drive the red fire truck to the rightmost exit of the parking lot and the game will be successful.

title: Sheep Sort Puzzle Sort Color
description: Sheep Sort Puzzle Sort Color is a fun and addictive puzzle game. You must move the sheep from one enclosure to another in order to match them by color. When all enclosures contain only sheep of the same color, you win. Dozens of challenging levels await your challenge, allowing you to exercise your brain in a fun and colorful environment. Have fun playing!

title: Pet Salon Simulator
description: It's a very busy day at the pet salon! Jump in and give our furry friends the full treatment. Wash, groom, and style them to look even more charming and adorable. Show off your grooming skills and create picture-perfect transformations that will make every pet leave feeling proud and confident!

title: Mr Bean Jump
description:
Jump on moving blocks and get as high as you can in the new official Mr Bean game!

Unlock hilarious costumes and hats from the show to make Mr Bean as unique as you like.

Unlock fun backgrounds and new blocks from the hit animated show.

title: JailBreak : Escape from Prison
description: Experience the thrill of jailbreak escape, find a way out to freedom in our adventure filled jailbreak games! In this exciting jailbreak escape journey, you’ll take on the role of a character trapped behind jail bars, where every level presents unique challenges and exciting mini games, leading to the final goal of prison escape. Your goal in this prison games? Outsmart the system, solve clever puzzles, and find a way out in this immersive jailbreak escape adventure.

title: Save the crop
description: Save the Crop is an exciting arcade game where you control a tractor to rescue crops from fire! ?? Quickly cut and collect crops before they burn, then stack and sell them to earn money. Use your earnings to upgrade your tractor, buy storage houses, and explore new fields. Navigate using joystick controls and master the art of saving and farming in this fast-paced, action-packed game!

title: Color Block Blast 3
description:
Drag and drop the correct block into the grid. Match 3 or more tiles of the same colour to eliminate them.

Score beautiful combos while earning bonus points and watching beautiful animations take shape.

How high can you score in this endless match 3 game?

title: Tropical Match
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure in Tropical Match 3! Help Coco, your lively island guide, find fruits and other island gems in a tropical paradise. Match exotic fruits, uncover vibrant flowers and observe colourful exotic birds while enjoying the island adventure. The game features exciting levels and a relaxing island soundtrack! So what are you waiting for? Enjoy the tropical paradise adventure now!

title: Pyramidz2
description: PyramidZ 2 is, as the name suggests, the sequel to PyramidZ. It's a Match-3 game where you have to slide a row or column to align Egyptian symbols. This version is faster and allows for more combos.

title: Block Puzzle 3D
description:
Block 3D Puzzle is a colorful logic game where you need to place 3D blocks on the board in the right order. Every move turns into a bright visual effect — when you place a figure and complete a line, the entire line lights up with that block’s color!
Plan your moves carefully, fill the lines, and clear space for new blocks. The game combines relaxing gameplay, smooth animations, and stylish 3D graphics, making every puzzle a true visual delight.

title: Stick Fight The Chaos
description: Hello young warriors! In Stick Fight The Chaos, the fierce battles between stickmen continue with even more action! Catch the weapons falling from the sky, challenge your opponent and become the champion of the battlefield! Keep your balance, focus on your enemy and keep fighting! Each level brings new surprises. Play alone or with a friend and defeat your opponents!

title: Jump Ball Classic
description: Jump Ball Classic is the best game to test your reflexes. Move your ball left and right to avoid obstacles and enjoy the thrilling moment! Once it hits, it will fail immediately. Concentrate and challenge for success!

title: Italian Brainrot Obby Parkour
description:
Italian Brainrot Obby Parkour is a wild and hilarious 2 player platforming experience that blends meme-fueled chaos with classic obby parkour mechanics. Inspired by games like Tower of Hell, this title brings the unpredictable humor of the Italian brainrot meme universe into a 3D climbing challenge.

Available characters are: 
-Tung Tung Sahur
-Brr Brr Patapim
-Burbaloni Luliloli
-Frigo Camelo
-Girafa Celestre
-Lirili Larila
-Orangutini Annaucini
-Tralalero Tralala
-Vaca Saturno Saturnita

title: Car Parking Stunt Games 2024
description: Play the new challenging car game on Impossible Tracks in car stunt games 3d of 2024. Join the world of real impossible tracks in car racing games. Experience the real car parking stunt game with no limits of enjoyment. Are you a fan of Hard Parking Games 2024.

title: G Wagon City Driver
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate busy morning streets, managing fuel and realistic traffic. Venture beyond the city to tackle rugged offroad terrain. Stunning morning graphics bring the city and landscapes to life, while unpredictable pedestrians and police chases add excitement. Customize your G-Wagon's look and performance, and enjoy the ride with your loyal dog. Whether evading cops or exploring trails, G-Wagon City Driver offers a thrilling experience.

title: The Drag Racing Challenge
description: Welcome to The Drag Racing Challenge game, an exciting new arcade racing game! Race through challenging missions, unlock and upgrade over 12 cars, and compete against opponents with customizable vehicles. Test your skills in realistic maps across five cities and enjoy smooth, high-quality racing. No fuel or time limits—just endless drag racing fun!

title: Shadow Fighter
description:
It's a free side-scrolling role-playing fighting game. Shadow Fighter is perfect for you if you like ninjas, swordsmen, role-playing games, or fighting games. Compared with other RPG fighting
games, this is an excellent PVP game. The game has two main modes: Solo Match and Team Mode. You can also view the leaderboard. In a Solo Match, you have to choose three heroes until one
side is completely wiped out, that is, the other side wins. Don't worry about not having a favorite hero.

title: Agent Squad
description:
Looking for an engaging casual shooter that’s easy to get the hang of but offers engrossing action and real tactical challenges? 
Agent Squad is a top-down shooting game with intelligent mechanics, loads of cool upgradable guns, and addictive gameplay

title: Stick War Saga
description: Prepare for an epic clash in Stick War: Saga, an exciting blend of fighting, action, strategy, and tower defense. Take command of your stickman army and lead them through nervous war campaigns. Mine resources, build your army, and unleash your strategic power to conquer enemy lands.

title: Dragon Escape
description: The cute dinosaur wants to reach the exit by eating Sandwich in the area protected by robots. If you want to help him, try to pass the levels by using laser traps without entering the robots' field of vision.

title: BitGoblins RPG Simulator
description:
Become the protector of the kingdom from goblin robbers!

Get stronger by fighting goblin armies! Upgrade your hero with every battle, earn gold and get new items

Defeat the leaders of the goblins - the ogres! Gain strength after fighting goblin armies and test your skills

Explore the possibilities of this game! Start as a young wizard and upgrade your abilities, get new equipment and become the menace of goblins.

title: Construction Set - 3D Builder
description:
Dive into the fascinating world of 3D constructors and puzzles, where each block is a new step towards creativity and development.
This game invites players to assemble amazing buildings, monuments and characters using more than 200 different bricks.
From simple sets to complex models, each level presents a new challenge and develops attention, logic and spatial thinking.

title: Alphabet Merge and Fight
description: Evolution Merge games that you like! Monsters from all over the universe are alive! Drag and combine letter monsters in the mutant fighting simulator. Play and explore Alphabet Letras workshop and adventure games! Monsters from other universes have joined the alphabet kitchen to fight in evolution games! Play in 3D as one of your favorite characters from the collection.

title: Bow And Arrow
description:
? Bow and Arrow – Master Your Archery Skills! ?

Step into the world of precision shooting in Bow and Arrow! Test your skills, aim with accuracy, and hit your targets in a variety of exciting levels. Whether you're shooting at moving targets, battling enemies, or competing in archery challenges, this game will put your skills to the test!

title: Minecraft Battle Party
description: Ready for a hot feast of square battles? In Minecraft Battle Party, you'll enter a pixel-styled battle arena where nervous fighting meets iconic Minecraft-style visuals. In this world, every game is a duel to the death. You will play different roles and use different weapons. For example, as a gunner, constantly move your character so that enemies are shot within your scanning range. Watch out for other people's attacks.

title: Magic Princess Dress Up Doll
description: Welcome to Magic Princess Dress Up Doll, a casual dress-up game for girl gamers. Have you ever dreamed of becoming a beautiful princess one day? Are you an enthusiast of dressing up fashion dolls? Come join us and realize all your imaginations about fashion design! This is a fashion design game where you can make up your own doll from scratch.

title: Toy Claw Simulator
description: Toy Claw Simulator is a fun and addictive arcade game where you take control of a virtual claw machine to collect a wide variety of adorable toys! Carefully aim and time your claw to grab plushies, action figures, and surprise collectibles. Once you've stocked up your toy inventory, head over to the factory to sell them for shiny coins! Use your earnings to run the machine to use the crane to unlock new toys. It's a charming blend of skill, strategy, and rewarding progression!

title: MR RACER - Car Racing
description: MR RACER - Car Racing is a thrilling and challenging racing game that will excite you! Race at high speed with stunning supercars and beat the traffic. This game provides a very easy-to-control car movement and is extremely fun to race.

title: Rainbow Balls 2048
description: A game in the genre of 2048, where you can skilfully use game physics to achieve victory. The main task is to connect the balls and reach the number 2048. The game also features a booster, which makes passing the game more fun and easier.

title: Incredible Kids Dentist
description: This is a dentist game for kids. Have you ever wanted to be a dentist? If this was your dream before, you should not miss this game. In this educational game, you can become a doctor in a hospital. You need to check the teeth of your patients.

title: Sakura Branch
description:
The "Sakura Branch" is an interesting and beautiful puzzle game.

In the game you have pieces of a dry branch of a beautiful tree.
Turn them around and put them together.
If you combine all the pieces, life will return to the branch and it will delight you with beautiful flowers!
If you are new, you can play on a very small field on which there will be very little branches.
But if you feel strong enough, you can collect a whole tree on a huge field!

title: Mutant Assassin 3D
description: In the action-packed game “Mutant Assassin 3D,” you become a skilled special agent. Armed with web-launching abilities, you take on bad guys across diverse terrains. Your mission: eliminate all foes by ensnaring them with your webs and delivering powerful punches. As you progress through 4 levels, prepare for the ultimate challenge: the boss level. No hints here—navigate the best route to victory on your own. Good luck!

title: Archers Random
description:
Archers Random is a fast-paced stickman archery game that tests your reflexes and aim.

Fight endless enemy waves, explore new areas, and earn coins to unlock helmets, armor, and triple arrows. Upgrade speed, damage, health, and arm power, master 12 special arrows like fire, poison, rocket, and electric, face epic bosses, and survive nonstop action.

Play solo or challenge a friend in 2 Player mode on the same device for intense head-to-head battles.

title: Bowling Stars
description: Enjoy a classic game of bowling with simple and fun gameplay. Earning trophies will unlock better bowling balls and help you win against more skilled opponents.

title: Ellie Chinese New Year Celebration
description: Celebrate the beauty and traditions of the Chinese New Year with Ellie in this fun and engaging game! Known as the Lunar New Year, this festival is marked by vibrant decorations, delicious food, and exciting cultural customs. Join Ellie as she prepares for the celebration by dressing up in stunning traditional outfits, decorating her space, and participating in festive activities.

title: Red Hide Ball
description: In Red Hide Ball you protect designated balls from roaming monsters by manipulating the level layout and placing shields or obstacles. Each stage presents a fixed arrangement of elements and predictable monster movements, turning each solution into a small tactical exercise. Success depends on reading patterns, timing actions and using limited moves to create safe zones. The game balances accessible mechanics with steadily increasing difficulty to engage players who enjoy pure logic challenges.

title: Billiards 3D: Russian Pyramid
description: Play a realistic online billiards game against virtual opponents of varying difficulty. Customize AI skill levels to match your ability and improve your game. Enjoy lifelike tables of different sizes and refine your strategy in this immersive billiards experience!

title: Atlantic Sky Hunter Xtreme
description: Embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey across the open Atlantic ocean in Atlantic Sky Hunter, an arcade endless shoot 'em up airplane game where you'll face off against challenging UFOs and formidable bosses, armed with an array of power-ups including spray bullets, extra health, and twin missiles; how high can you soar in this thrilling shmup adventure?

title: Army Fight 3d
description: Begin the nervous army battles in Army Fight 3D. Here you need strategic thinking and quick reflexes.In this fun action battle game, you aim to build a powerful army. Defend your base, and defeat the enemy. Start by creating and upgrading your army.

title: Hide And Seek Horror Escape
description: Hide And Seek: Horror Escape is an asymmetric horror escape game. Abandoned schools and haunted hospitals, here's a lot of hidden secrets and treasures are waiting to be discovered. During the game, there are two identities for you to choose, hide or seek?

title: Christmas Blocks Sort
description: Blocks Sort Christmas Edition brings a cozy holiday twist to the classic sorting puzzle. All the blocks have turned into festive Christmas colors like bright red, pine green, frosty blue, and warm gold. They start mixed together in different columns, and your job is to sort them so each column ends up with just one color. The rules are simple, but the challenge is still satisfying. Think ahead, plan your moves, and slowly bring order to the holiday chaos.

title: Pinball Basketball
description: A captivating fusion of classic arcade pinball excitement and thrilling sports gameplay. Flip your paddle skillfully to keep the ball in play, aiming for the basketball hoop while enjoying the stunning minimalist art and responsive design that make every moment electrifying and addictive.

title: Math Quest
description: "Math Quest" - an exciting game for the whole family that develops mathematical skills, logic, and reaction speed. Overcome challenges, calculate correct answers, and reach new levels!

title: Hamster Combo IDLE
description: Upgrade your stock market hamster! A new Idle clicker, thanks to which you will learn a lot about cryptocurrency exchanges. Dig up the crypt and upgrade your hamster.

title: Happy Brothers
description: The New Year has arrived, and the two siblings have decorated the house beautifully. The siblings are very happy, but they want to go outside. To leave the house, they need to find the key and the yellow diamond. If they find both and activate the portal, they can escape the house. The two siblings, wearing Christmas clothes, begin searching for the key inside the house. They also need to gather the gift boxes.

title: Solitaire Match
description: Let's develop the village by accumulating coins in Solitaire. When you match cards to make a total of 10, the cards will disappear, earning you coins. Continue removing cards until there are no more matching combinations, and clear the stage by achieving the coin quota. If the quota is not achieved and the slots become full, it's a failure. Earn more coins by matching combinations with a greater number of cards or by continuously matching cards in a short amount of time.

title: Alphabet Lore Maze
description: Alphabet Maze: Escape Letters is an exciting puzzle game that will help develop the struggle of minds and learn the letters of the alphabet. In this educational game you will explore the maze, defeating monsters, teddy bear and letter creatures. Choose characters from the collection that include Huggy, Teddy Bear, Harry and many other unique characters. To get out of the maze, you need to choose rooms with a smaller number than yours and avoid monsters larger than your level.

title: Traffic Cop 3D
description: Traffic Cop 3D is a casual game where you play as a police officer enforcing the law of the road. Scan nearby drivers and use intel from the police database to decide whether you should pull them over, or let them go, all while progressing through the story and increasing your duties as a cop.

title: BFF Happy Spring
description: Welcome to the Bff Happy Spring games. Princesses Belle, Tiana, and Moana are best friends. They planned to organize a party to welcome the most adorable spring season. They already filled their wardrobe with a cherry blossom collection of outfits. Being a design expert join and help them to choose the best outfit for them. Have fun!

title: King Kong Chaos
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure in King Kong Chaos, a modern 2D pixel art game where players must navigate through perilous levels, dodging spiked balls and barrels hurled by a colossal gorilla. Along the way, pick up the pickaxe strategically to destroy incoming barrels and secure the coveted golden banana to progress.

title: Seat Puzzle Cut The Rope
description: Face a wildly satisfying brain challenge in Seat Puzzle - Cut The Rope. This addictive puzzle game blends smart logic with relaxing casual gameplay, creating the perfect experience for those who love thinking fast and solving clever challenges! In each level, chairs are bound by ropes. Your task is to cut the ropes according to the passengers' colors.

title: Graffiti Tags: spray painting
description:
Become a graffiti master in our simulator! Realistic physics, a wide range of colors and surfaces. Draw on the walls, avoid the police and create unique masterpieces of street art.

Your path will not be easy — the police will pursue you at every step. But if you avoid them, your works can become a real cultural heritage! Get inspired, develop your skills, experiment with colors and fonts to create unforgettable graffiti.

title: Cooking Cafe Food Chef
description:
Prepare and cook delicious food from all over the world in Cooking Cafe Story. Build the cafe of your dreams while serving hot meals to hungry customers at a fast pace! Don't let the time run out, practice your time management skills, and experience the craze of real cooking!

Dash from cafe's to restaurants and unlock many locations as your progress on your journey. This cooking game offers endless fun levels with challenging missions set up in each level to give you that special experience!

title: Cake Sorting Deluxe
description: Cake Sorting Deluxe is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that challenges your sorting skills! Shift cakes across shelves to make matches of three or more. Clear the board, uncover hidden and shadowed cakes, and solve tricky puzzles as you go. With cute visuals, smooth gameplay, and lots of sweet challenges, Cake Sorting Deluxe is a treat for anyone who loves a good puzzle. Ready to mix, match, and clear the shelves?

title: Brainrot Mob Clash 3D
description: Welcome to the wild and chaotic world of Brainrot Mob Clash 3D. It’s a full-blown racing and fighting adventure. Dash through 3D obstacle courses, avoid deadly traps like spikes and spinning saws. Match and merge your stickman army. Crush enemy mobs in exciting action-packed battles. As you run, collect brainrot characters to increase your numbers and merge them to form powerful units.

title: Hero Story - Monsters Crossing
description:
An addictive hyper-casual game.
Build the bridges nicely to cross as many deeps as possible.
Use the special items (Attack, Second Chance, Accurate Eye, Jump) wisely to help your hero on his adventure.
There are many nice themes and cool heroes to unlock.
A global leaderboard is also supported. Try to win high scores and raise your name on the leaderboard.
ENJOY NOW!

title: Peg Solitaire
description: Engage your mind with the classic puzzle game, Peg Solitaire. The objective is simple yet challenging: clear the board by jumping pegs over each other until only one peg remains. This timeless game tests your strategic thinking and planning skills, offering various levels of difficulty to keep you entertained.

title: Ibiza Foam Party
description: Splash around in a sea of bubbles, dance to pumping beats, and compete against friends in wild and energetic beauty challenges. Ready to get the fun started? Then join Gina and Selena in this colorful, summer-themed makeover game for girls, and help them deal with their dazzling party looks. From scrubbing and skincare to makeup and fabulous fashion, you’re the ultimate stylist, ensuring these besties shine bright under the Ibiza sun.

title: Bike Stunt Racing Legend
description: Bike Stunt Racing Legend is not merely a motorcycle racing but also a balanced stunt simulation game. Under a 3D game engine, you are required to ride the motorbike to the finish line in the first place. As long as you can keep high speed, the AI opponent will make mistakes and lose you. Don't be afraid of rolling ramps, pass the green arrows to speed up more easily. Keep calm and step on the gas!

title: My Cake Shop: Bake & Serve
description: Run your own sweet bakery in My Cake Shop! Bake and stack colorful donuts, clean messy floors, and serve hungry customers. Expand across the world by unlocking new bakery locations and upgrading machines. Manage crowds, grow your patisserie empire, and become the ultimate idle arcade tycoon!

title: Geometry Dash Maze Maps
