description: Welcome to one of the funniest and coolest skill games - Geometry Dash Maze map. Here, you will dive into the fun and amazing world of geometric shapes. Your character will become a cool glowing square with a big smile. In the game, you will help the square overcome all obstacles. To do this, you will need all your dexterity and cunning, because a difficult path awaits you ahead. Be careful and try to click quickly to make the jump in time. Think over all actions and prepare for the next jump,

title: Sea Battle Admiral
description:
Do you remember your favorite childhood entertainment with paper and pencils?
Then, immerse yourself in the exciting sea battles on your device's screen.
The classic paper-based tabletop naval combat game is here!
Enjoy exciting naval battles, strategy, and adrenaline.

title: Catch The Pig
description: This is a casual elimination game. The main purpose of the game is to find three identical pigs, catch them, and collect all the pig collections!

title: Fish Story 3
description: Welcome to Fish Story 3! Immerse yourself in 4,000+ levels of Match 3 excitement guided by our mermaid host. Solve puzzles, conquer Daily Missions, and unlock treasures in the Daily Challenge. Dive into addictive challenges and return daily for rewards. Join the underwater adventure now!

title: Marble Bubble Legend
description: Marble Puzzle Quest is a fun and addictive casual puzzle game where your task is to sort colorful marbles into the correct slots. With each new level, the challenge grows — chains become longer and more colorful, while the space for moves gets tighter. Use logic, plan ahead, and clear the board! Watch out: the marbles fill four slots at the top, and only three of the same color will disappear. Place them incorrectly, and you lose the round.

title: Fortune's Deck Solitaire
description:
Welcome to Fortune's Deck Solitaire, where ancient Tarot magic meets the timeless thrill of Tripeaks!

Three enchanted towers of fate await your touch - draw from the mystical deck and begin your journey through the arcana.

Inspired by the classic Tripeaks Solitaire, this magical twist invites you to clear the cards, trust your intuition, and let the deck reveal your fortune.

Will you find insight, mystery… or unexpected luck?

title: PuzzleJam
description:
Puzzle Jam is a bright and fun puzzle game where you merge jellies of the same color to clear the board and complete each level!
Easy controls and smooth gameplay make it accessible for players of all ages . Each level brings a new challenge – find the smartest moves, use boosters, and unlock powerful combos!

title: Stack Blocks Connect Wooden Blocks!
description: ● This is a game in which you have to connect wooden blocks?! Compete with friends and colleagues?! In the game you have a playing area? where you must connect blocks to fill the line! Once the line is full, the blocks will disappear and give you the most points?! Compete with friends or colleagues on the leaderboard?! Enjoy your game?!

title: Hobo Speedster
description: Hobo Speedster is an exciting motorcycle platform BMX game featuring 2D cartoon graphics. Your mission? Keep the motorcycle balanced until you reach the finish line. As you earn coins and diamonds, upgrade your current bike at the motorcycle settlement, purchase 3 more motorcycles from the Shop, and unlock 4 additional riders in the Decorate section. Ready for a personal challenge? Explore various maps and aim to complete all 7 tasks for extra rewards!

title: Mafia Roulette
description:
Mafia Roulette
Play against the mafia with 5 lives each. Only one survives.
Use 3 starting cards to:

Deal more damage or block attacks
Draw or steal cards
Change rules mid-game

Bet tokens to test your luck. Each move is critical - risk for rewards or play it safe?
Every round tests strategy, psychology, and chance. Ready to prove you're the ultimate gambler?

title: Island Battle 3D
description: Jump and survive in Island Battle 3D, a 3D IO game that will keep you on your toes. You will play as a jumper who must avoid falling off the island. You will also have to knock back your enemies and be the last one standing. You will face a strategic challenge, as the island’s surface is constantly breaking and changing. You can use this to your advantage and push your rivals into the gaps. But watch out, they can do the same to you.

title: Crazy Traffic Control
description:
You control the traffic in the most realistic, craziest one-touch traffic game!
Put your timing and skills to the test with:

- realistic traffic 
- realistic acceleration   
- realistic stopping times!
- trains
- cows
- pedestrians

Unbelievably absorbing and incredibly fun — clear the intersections with Crazy Traffic Control!

title: Block Puzzle King
description: Smart Puzzle Block is a classic elimination game. Its adorable graphics prevent eye strain, and varied level difficulties keep it engaging. The game maintains freshness while offering abundant props for players to strategically use.

title: Find Sort Match
description: Find Sort Match is a fun and creative puzzle that combines sort and match elements. Let you experience the joy of DIY! In the game, sort and match items of various shapes, colors, and types. And complete each level of the challenge.

title: Grunge Chic Alt Fashion
description:
Step into the edgy world of Grunge Chic Alt Fashion, where style meets attitude. This dress-up game lets you explore the perfect mix of grunge edge and chic sophistication.

From plaid skirts and ripped jeans to oversized jackets, fishnets, and combat boots—you’ll have endless options to design your alternative fashion star. Top it off with smoky makeup, bold lipstick, and layered accessories to complete the vibe.

title: Mosquito Bite 3d
description: Play the role of a buzzing mosquito and start a fun simulator. Flying through various environments to find your target and attack her. Your goal is to find the best moment to sneak up on your target and bite her. Your tasks such as attacking a human's head or legs. But be careful, your target might swat at you at any time.

title: Mr Reckless: Car Chase Simulator
description:
Run fast, crash hard, and cheat death — in style.

Race through a chaotic low-poly city as you dodge police, traffic, and total destruction. Use game-changing power-ups like Slow-Mo, Freeze, Nitro to escape the impossible.

One rule: don’t stop. How long can you stay free?

title: Snake King
description: Get ready to slither your way to the top in this addictive take on the classic Snake game! As the Snake King, you’ll navigate through a maze-like arena, avoiding collisions with the four walls and your own tail.

title: Color Dash
description: Color Dash is a fast-paced endless runner that tests your reflexes and color matching skill! Pilot a speeding rocket and match its color to smash through colored gates. Dodge the wrong colors and react to frantic color changes to keep your run alive. Grab powerful shield and nitro power-ups to blast further and beat your personal best score in this addictive arcade adventure. How high can you score?

title: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game
description: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game is a chaotic puzzle hunt where you track a target brainrot through surreal, meme-soaked worlds. Each level pushes you to spot the same creature across dense, absurd scenes packed with icons like 67, Strawberry Elephant, Dragon Cannelloni, Spaghetti Tualetti, and La Supreme Combinasion. Fast-paced scanning, wild details, and pure internet nonsense create a frantic, high-energy experience for fans of intense spotting and brainrot chaos.

title: DIY Makeup Salon - SPA Makeover Studio
description:
Have you ever dreamt of becoming a fashionable DIY make-up stylist in the beauty makeup artist’s salon?

Welcome to the DIY Makeup Salon: SPA Makeover- a fascinating beauty salon game, where you can create fun-filled makeovers for pretty girls! You can showcase your skills as a make-up stylist in our salon. Make use of various tools and facial cleansers to give your model a refreshing skin makeover. There are numerous dress up designs to explore for a flawless make up look!

title: Butterfly Match Mastery
description:
Plunge into the atmosphere of a magical forest in a new game in the style of Mahjong Connect. Free the butterflies by finding identical pairs of wings!

Butterfly Match Mastery is an amazing game that will give you moments of pleasure. Free butterflies in an enchanted magical forest by connecting pairs of identical wings and enjoy their flight! But don't forget about the time, when it runs out - you will lose.

title: Screw Jam!
description:
Let's embark on a mechanical journey like no other in Screw Jam Puzzle. Your mission is to untwist screws and put them in the right screw boxes. You win when completing all the screw sets.

FEATURES
- Addictive gameplay, help you relax and train your brain
- ASMR Screw game: Beautiful design with satisfying in-game sounds

This challenging and addictive Screw jam game will put your problem-solving skills to the test as you twist, turn, and put all the screws into right screw boxes.

title: The Roman Empire Colosseum
description: The war in the colosseum has never been as epic as in this game! Arrange your units and send them into battle! This online game is a battle simulator similar to Totally Accurate Battle Simulator. Your units include warriors, riders, titans, dwarves, mages, and more.

title: Color Wood Animal Jam
description: Begin a charming logic puzzle match game in Color Wood Animal Jam. Drag the colorful wooden animal pieces into their correct spots. Complete each delightful jam puzzle. One wrong move can make the color block jam even trickier.

title: Cat Match 3
description: Dive into Cat Match 3, the thrilling Match-3 puzzle adventure! Match, swap, and blast through vibrant levels filled with unique obstacles, epic power-ups, and explosive combos. Journey through enchanting worlds, unlock daily rewards, and conquer special events. Challenge friends on the leaderboard or team up in exciting tournaments. With increasing difficulty and endless puzzles, every swipe brings you closer to victory. Ready to start matching magic? Join the adventure today!

title: Little Lily Halloween Prep
description: Welcome to Little Lily Halloween Prep. It’s time to celebrate Halloween with Little Lily! Enjoy a memorable Halloween night with Lily and play fun-packed Halloween games and activities. Help the lily to complete her makeover, then help her with Halloween face painting. Browse her wardrobe and pick cute outfits and costumes. Finally, help her with cake decoration. A lot more to enjoy and explore this Halloween season with Little Lily. Happy Halloween!!

title: Magic Printer
description: This is a simulation game, you play a shop assistant, for the small animals to print the goods they need, then you will get gold, gold can be used to decorate your shop, upgrade your equipment, this game is very good, come and play.

title: Color Nuts & Bolts Puzzle
description: Color Nuts & Bolts Puzzle is a fun and engaging puzzle game that challenges your spatial imagination and color-matching skills! Match colorful screws to their corresponding nuts and watch as your puzzle-solving skills bring vibrant images to life. Perfect for players of all ages, this game offers hours of brain-teasing fun with a visually satisfying reward at the end of each challenge. Test your logic, precision, and creativity in this unique puzzle-solving adventure!

title: Komaru cat
description:
Take care of Komaru the cat! Pet her, feed her, bathe her, and tuck her in for sleep!
Dress her up in stylish looks! Hats, glasses, collars, new fur colors, and more! Experiment and create your own unique cat!
Play the merge mini-game, compete on the leaderboard, and earn coins!
Watch the best video memes with funny moments from her life!
Complete the daily challenges and come back tomorrow, Komaru will miss you!
Try to unlock all achievements! Come and have fun!

title: Tropical Cubes 2048
description: A game in the genre of 2048. Skillfully use the game physics to your advantage. The goal of the game is to connect the cubes to the maximum number 2048 and not to lose. There is a booster in the game, which will make it fun and easier to pass the game.

title: Magic Forest - Merge the Secrets
description:
The Magic Forest is full of amazing little places!
Do you want to take a walk here?
Then hurry and start your journey!
And to make it even more fun, you’ll have company - Masha, a young girl who loves discovering new and mysterious things.
Even if it sometimes means sneaking away from Grandma and missing lunch.

title: City Builder
description: How do you become the mayor of your town? Find the right valley and build everything from scratch with your own hands. Then the residents will help you make your town even better and even share their equipment!

title: Merge Cube Challenge
description: Merge Cube Challenge offers a unique 2048 experience with its innovative endless mode. You can play alone or compete with your friends. Also, test your strategy and quick thinking skills by competing against the CPU. In endless mode, try to get the highest score by using the bomb special power. With the excitement increasing with each move, collect points and leave your opponents behind! Are you ready to immerse yourself in this excitement?

title: Crazy Bus Station
description: Embark on a thrilling puzzle adventure! Maneuver buses through challenging parking lots, match cars with their passengers, and clear the path. Unlock unique vehicles, tackle puzzles of all difficulty levels, and use boosters to sort or shuffle when needed. With vibrant graphics and creative gameplay, this game offers fun for players of all ages!

title: Labuba Halloween Infestation
description: Monsters are invading Halloween! You must destroy them all — the fate of Halloween is in your hands. The game features three different modes, each with tougher and more powerful monsters.

title: Car Mechanic Simulator 2025
description:
In "Car Mechanic Simulator 2025", you are a master restorer who breathes new life into forgotten cars! 

Your task is to find old, broken, and abandoned cars, disassemble them down to the last screw, repair them, replace parts, and reassemble them, turning rusty piles of metal into shiny legends of the automotive industry. Search for rare spare parts, restore engines, choose the perfect paint, and bring every detail to perfection.

title: Blue Mushroom Cat Run
description: Catch the mischievous thief in Blue Mushroom Cat Run! A cunning thief has snatched your gold, and guess what? Unlock vibrant worlds and zoom through endless obstacles in this action-packed runner. From sun-kissed beaches to neon-lit night streets, every map offers fresh surprises and heart-pounding thrills.

title: 2 Player Online Chess
description: Enjoy the classic game of chess with 2 Player Online Chess! Play solo against the computer or challenge a friend in 2-player mode. Easy to use, with no distractions—just simple, fun chess for everyone. Start playing today!

title: Doors Awakening
description: This is a challenging puzzle-solving online game.  This game has wonderful 3D graphics enabling you to explore the handcrafted levels. The fascinating visual effects, realistic atmosphere, and natural camera controls will keep you returning for more. If you'd prefer puzzle games, don't miss this wonderful challenge.

title: Kaboom Miner
description:
A fast-paced logical arcade inspired by classic Boulder Dash, but taken to the next level with massive chain explosions.
Your goal is simple—but dangerous: destroy all 50 explosive crates. Use falling stones, carefully placed bombs, and clever terrain manipulation to trigger devastating chain reactions. Every move matters. Push stones, move crates, build bridges from bricks, and even trap the Ghost before finishing it off.

title: Truck Simulator: Russia
description: In Truck Simulator: Russia you will drive a truck. As a driver, you will deliver cargoes to various cities and travel the open world. Unlock new types of goods to receive a greater reward for delivery. With the money you earn, you can buy a new truck or improve your trucks, as well as upgrade driver skills.

title: Race Clicker
description: Race Clicker is an action-packed idle clicker racing game that'll pump up your adrenaline. Customize, upgrade, and speed your way to victory. Each click pushes your limits, every upgrade unveils new possibilities, and each race dares you to click faster. Leave rivals in the dust and satisfy your need for speed with endless excitement. Start your engines and hit the track now!

title: TOP HOG
description: Welcome to the forest adventure! A drowsy bear just wants to rest, but a playful group of hedgehogs  has decided to throw a party close by. Your task? Grab a hockey stick and send those troublemakers soaring through the air! Build your strength, collect bonuses to enhance your skills, and face the exciting challenges in each level. Who will rise as the winter forest champion? Become a true bear hockey expert! Simple to play, fun, and packed with thrilling airborne action! Give it a try now!

title: Run N Shoot
description: You run and you shoot. That’s all you do, but this deceptively simple game mixes up the action and racks up the adrenalin with surprises round every corner to ensure you never get bored. Trigger finger itchy?

title: Hamstercycle
description:
Help a genius hamster bust out of a mad professor's lab on his slick DIY ride - the Hamstercycle!

Jump across furniture and whatever junk the prof left lying around to reach the portal at the end of each room. But watch out - the floor is guarded by laser sensors! Touch it, and the hamster gets caught!

Fun physics, simple controls, and hundreds of exciting levels await!

title: Brainrot Bridge Race 3D
description: This is not just a simple running and racing game. It’s a brainrot-style 3D battle where speed and strategy collide! Your goal is to collect as many bananas as possible while sprinting through hilarious obstacle courses. Collect more bananas to evolve your form.

title: Farm Animal Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to Farm Animal Sort Puzzle, a fun and relaxing casual puzzle game set on a lively farm. Your mission is simple but addictive: match the appropriate animal or vegetable to the customer's needs. Sort adorable farm animals into the correct spaces and enjoy the satisfying challenge of smart organization.

title: Coin Blitz
description: Fast-paced coin shooting action! Destroy waves of enemies, collect tons of coins, and grow stronger as you play. Drag and position your shooter strategically while watching satisfying coin explosions and smooth gameplay. Simple to start, hard to master — how long can you survive?

title: Football Fun
description: Play as a team of 3 players against your opponents. Score goals and deflect attacks. Become the best player! The game has a store where you can buy many different balls and even stadiums. And the best players get on the leaderboard.

title: Going Balls Adventure 2
description: Going Balls Adventure 2 is a ball-rolling arcade game with a 3D game engine. Your main mission is to collect black balls and reach the checkpoint. Your side mission is to collect all coins on the platform. It doesn't matter if you don't fish the job. Before the level begins, you have a chance to try some free skins for you to decide on a favorite one.

title: Paper.io 2
description:
Conquer as much territory as possible and beat the competition.
A smooth drawing experience!

Use your paper block to steal the area from your online opponents in this game. Capture as much space as possible and try to get the highest score in the lobby. If you move outside your own color, your tail becomes exposed. You will be eliminated when someone manages to catch your tail. So you need to take risks to expand your colored area.

title: Pixel Number - DIY Coloring
description: Unleash your creativity with Pixel Number – DIY Coloring! Choose from a huge collection of pixel art images – from cute animals to cool patterns – and bring them to life with color.

title: World Cup 2026 Soccer Game
description:
Choose your national team and enter the excitement of the World Cup! 
Play as your favorite heroes like Cristiano Ronald, Lionel Messi or Kylian Mbappe and jump into fast-paced 1v1 soccer battles to claim the cup! 
Defend your goal, watch for the perfect opening, and strike to score!
Challenge the CPU or compete against friends, sharpen your skills, and climb your way to the top. Victory is just a goal away!

title: Mini Golf Battle
description: Mini Golf Battle is a casual sports puzzle where precision and timing decide the outcome. Your task is to sink the ball into the hole with the fewest strokes possible while navigating ramps, walls, and tricky obstacles. Special power-ups like Fire, Wing, and Spring shots add variety, letting you approach each course with unique strategies. Whether for short play sessions or longer runs, Mini Golf Battle delivers an engaging mix of relaxation and skillful play.

title: Arrow Count Master
description: Arrow Count Master is a fast and satisfying runner where every choice changes your firepower. Swipe to move and choose between gates that add, subtract, multiply, or boost your arrows. Build the biggest arrow count possible while avoiding penalties and obstacles along the way.

title: Dollys Restaurant Organizing
description: This exciting game is designed to help you organize better and release your stress. You will draw inspiration and creativity of storage through [Storage Master], and pack your life comfortably and cleanly. You can organize and clean objects by category, storage location and cleaning order. This game will bring you the creative inspiration of storage, allowing you to easily apply it in real life. Similar to a jigsaw puzzle, you have to pick the right object and put it in the right place

title: Food Merge
description: ​Food Merge is a game where you combine different foods to create delicious dishes and serve them to hungry customers. Merge ingredients quickly and strategically to before the time runs out! Each level brings new challenges, faster orders, and more complex combos. Can you keep up and become the ultimate food master?

title: Mind Games: Math Crosswords
description:
Mind Games: Math Crosswords is a game to improve your math skills. It is a great way to spend your time. 
The player's mission is to save the planet from extinction. The aliens have destroyed all the plants on the planet. However, humans have found a solution. Engineers have built ships that convert brain activity into life-giving energy to grow plants. By solving mathematical problems, you are contributing to the restoration of plants and the regeneration of our planet.

title: Stick Kill 3D
description: Play as a stickman armed with a pistol in this puzzle-based shooter, where precision and clever thinking are key. Find the right angle, line up your shots, and eliminate enemies in creative ways. Each level becomes more challenging, testing your accuracy and problem-solving skills.

title: Cat Rescue
description: Protect the cat from dragon invasions through strategic sort puzzle combat. As enemies display colored patterns, your cannon must sort puzzle sequences to match their hues. Click the correctly colored cannon to obliterate matching dragon sections. Each precise cannon shot slows their advance toward the cat! Repeat until dragon threats vanish, but remember: rescue missions demand speed and sort puzzle accuracy!

title: Beauty World and Fashion Stylist
description: Play stylist game just now! This is the most fashionable salon for girls, where you can not only do makeup, but also dress characters in nice outfits! Change accessories, hairstyles and interior, take screenshot and save stylish images to the gallery!

title: Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle
description: Dive into the relaxing world of Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle! Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the flasks until each flask contains only one color. With over 1000 levels and unique modes like Color Fusion, Mystery, and Time Trial, this puzzle game will test your logic and patience. Unlock new themes and achievements as you play!

title: Solitaire Story Tripeaks 6
description: The highly anticipated 6th installment of one of the most popular Solitaire Story card games of all time! Your good friend Foxy will take you on a journey to new destinations, visiting countries, landscapes, and landmarks like Japan, Egypt, Brazil, Korea, New Zealand, Madagascar, North Pole, and Fiji. With 6700+ levels, Daily Missions, Weekly Air Balloon and Pet Events, and dozens of new card designs, this is the biggest Solitaire Story game yet!

title: Rabbit & Carrot
description: Help the rabbit collect all of the carrots on each level and get to the flag. Lots of spikes and spiky enemies to avoid. Open gates and use bubbles to float across the screen. 48 challenging levels in this fun platformer.

title: Color Yarn Sort
description: Color Yarn Sort is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you need to sort colorful spools of yarn into their matching buckets. The challenge? You have limited space to place the buckets, and you must think carefully about which bucket to move forward. Each yarn color must be placed in its corresponding bucket, but you can only move the buckets into the available spaces—there’s no room for error!

title: Push.io
description: Push.io is a fast-paced arena game where you battle to stay on the map and push everyone else off. Wield your boomerang with precision to knock rivals into the water while dodging incoming attacks. The longer you survive, the higher you rank; fall early, and you’ll drop in the standings. Earn trophies, upgrade your boomerang between rounds, and rise through the ranks to become the ultimate arena champion.

title: Stunt Multiplayer Arena
description:
Go solo in a free roam challenge where you can pull off incredible stunts like front and backflips. Navigate icy and dirt tracks as you push various vehicles to their limits.

In the multiplayer derby mode, choose your vehicle—whether it's a car, truck, or van—and engage in a fierce survival derby. Compete against all other vehicles in an intense, smashing battle. 

Jump into the action today and see if you have what it takes to rule the arena!

title: Dusty Maze Hunter
description:
Dusty Maze Hunter beckons you to a distinctive maze adventure, blending puzzle-solving with strategic gameplay.

Tailored for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers, it promises an exhilarating journey through labyrinthine rooms filled with diverse obstacles. As you progress through multiple levels, you'll have the chance to refine your problem-solving skills and strategic thinking.

Are you prepared to unleash your strategy and triumph over the dust? The maze adventure awaits!

title: Color Brain Test Games
description: Color Brain Test Game is a ring puzzle game. Do you want to train your brain?  You love fun spinning circle puzzle games with simple and colorful gameplay. Play Color Brain Test Games now!

title: Push The Colors
description: Push the Color game features colorful squares, obstacles, and color gates. It is a 2-player casual game where you can find various costumes during the adventure. The goal is to get the cubes to the finish line and challenge the giant at the end. The more cubes you have, the more power you will possess. You can defeat the color monster by having many cubes. Make wise choices along the way and increase the number of cubes in your possession.

title: 3D Kid Sliding Puzzle
description: We've taken the classic sliding puzzle into a whole new 3D world. Kids will need to slide the scrambled blocks to rearrange them and complete adorable cartoon pictures, such as little animals, vehicles, and fairy-tale characters. The game features vibrant colors and lively 3D models that will immediately capture a child's attention. Not only does it provide hours of fun, but it also helps develop a child's logical thinking, spatial awareness, and problem-solving skills.

title: Wipe Insight Master
description: Dop 3: Draw One Part is a free drawing online game for boys. Use your finger to draw and outline the shapes of the parts that the drawings need. Solve puzzles by using your powers of logic and lateral thinking as you work your way through a huge series of cute drawings that all have something a little bit wrong with them, it's up to you to work it out!

title: Hexa Sort 3D
description: Hexa Sort 3D mixes puzzle challenges, strategic matching and a satisfying merging experience.Involving clever puzzle-solving and logical manoeuvres, this game is ideal for those seeking a mental workout. As the levels progress, players will find the game both addictive and calming, striking the perfect balance between challenge and relaxation. Put your skills to the test with tasks such as sorting, stacking and merging hexagonal tiles.

title: Plane Chase
description:
Ever watched a plane soar across the blue sky and thought, 'Hey, I could catch that… in my car!'? Well, your oddly specific and gravity-defying dreams are about to come true in 'Plane Chase'!

Fasten your seatbelts, rev the engine, and remember: it's not car theft if you're aiming for the plane! Are you ready for takeoff in the wackiest chase ever? Download 'Plane Chase' and steer your way through this high-flying, tire-screeching adventure. The skies are literally not the limit!

title: SkillWarz
description: SkillWarz is a fast-paced first-person shooter offering advanced movement mechanics and diverse game modes like Deathmatch, Gun Game, and Skull Hunt. Navigate through dynamic day and night maps featuring bounce pads, teleports, and battle pickups.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

description: A burst of color, clever thinking, and adorable cats await you in Meow Block: Color Collect! This charming puzzle experience turns simple movements into brain-teasing fun, where every swipe matters and every match brings you closer to victory.

description: Frost Land - Snow Survival is a strategic base-building game where you battle the harsh cold to stay alive. You’ll wield a flamethrower to melt snow, uncover hidden resources, and expand your shelter. Every choice matters—manage supplies wisely and decide which frozen zones to explore as you carve out survival in a relentless winter.

You can use different tools to clean and massage your body parts. But it is important to note that each mode has a countdown time and you must choose the right tool to do the cleaning.

title: Stack n Sort
description:
Welcome to Stack n Sort, the ultimate color stack game that combines precision, hoop sort strategy, and excitement in one addictive experience.

Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant stack color and dynamic hoop sort challenges as you test your skills and aim for high scores. Whether you’re a casual gamer or a competitive enthusiast, hoop stack offers endless fun and engagement.

title: Mini Scrapbook Paper

In this game, you can design a journal freely. With colorful pages, fancy stickers and other cute accessories we prepared for you, you can use your imagination as much as you like. Have a good time!

Hidden images — every cleared puzzle board reveals a new picture.

They must rotate and position pipes of different shapes, such as straight lines, elbows, and T-junctions, within a set amount of time or space as the puzzles get harder. Obstacles such as various sources, restricted routes, or challenging layouts are specific to each level.

Enter the arena and fight for victory!

Dive into an exciting adventure with Robby, a brave hero who finds himself trapped in a labyrinth filled with ghosts and mysterious loot boxes. Conquer territories and emerge victorious with stunning graphics and gripping gameplay. Join us now for an unbeatable gaming adventure!

title: MeatRider
description: Welcome to "MeatRider" — an intense action-packed game set in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by zombies. You find yourself right in the middle of the chaos, where your only goal is to survive at all costs. Choose one of the unique combat vehicles, each with its own special abilities and weapons, and get ready for dynamic battles across a zombie-infested desert landscape.

title: Stunt Bike Rider Bros
description: Stunt Bike Rider Bros is a motorcycle racing and show game that you can play in both 1 player and 2 player mode with your friend. There are 3 different game modes in the game. In the "Racing Mode", you can compete with both your friend and other motorcycle drivers. In the "Career Mode", try to complete the difficult stages in a limited time. In the "Open World", you can earn coins and diamonds by performing various stunts with your motorcycles.

title: Squid Game 3D
description:
Engaging Puzzles: Each level offers a unique challenge, whether it’s rhythm-based action, strategic battles, or construction puzzles.
Diverse Gameplay: No two levels are the same, keeping players engaged and on their toes.
Skill Progression: As you advance, levels become more complex, requiring a blend of quick thinking, strategy, and precise execution.

title: Mega Ramp Car Stunts
description:
Get ready for the ultimate stunt-driving challenge in Mega Ramp Car Stunts! Take control of powerful cars and race down sky-high mega ramps to perform mind-blowing jumps, flips, and tricks. Defy gravity as you soar through the air and land like a pro on impossible tracks.

With dynamic gameplay, extreme stunts, and intense visuals, this is the stunt arena where only the boldest drivers survive!

title: 12-in-1 Solitaire
description:
Solitaire is one of the most popular – if not the most popular – card games in the world! Experience premium Solitaire gameplay at its best with 12 of the world's most popular Solitaire games!

Welcome to our latest & most comprehensive collection of the world's best & most popular Solitaire games! We included 12 of the most beloved Solitaire games in 1 comphrehensive collection, added helpful features appreciated by both Solitaire pros and amateurs alike.

title: Ninja Obby Parkour
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Ninja Obby Parkour, where every level is a test of speed, agility, and strategy. Packed with hundreds of unique obstacle courses, this game combines competitive racing with ninja-style combat and dazzling customization options.

From smashing glass doors at checkpoints with your ninja power to unlocking powerful bonuses like speed boost, giant mode, and flight, every run feels fresh.

title: Bubble Blitz Galaxy
description: Welcome to Bubble Blitz Galaxy! Aim and shoot bubbles towards similar ones to collect them while ensuring they stay away from the borderline. Experience two exciting modes: In Arcade Mode, strive to survive as long as possible and score as much as you can. In Challenge Mode, survive and achieve target scores, facing new challenges one after another. Get ready for an exhilarating bubble-blasting adventure!

title: Tripeaks Solitaire Escapes
description: Play Solitaire TriPeaks Escapes, a relaxing card game with a warm summer vibe. Explore hundreds of unique solitaire levels featuring stunning graphics and vibrant beach landscapes. Master challenging card puzzles using powerful boosters, train your brain and sharpen your strategy. Dive into this colorful TriPeaks world and enjoy a soothing, slow-paced adventure. Escape the daily grind and find your zen in every hand you play!

title: Farm Tiles Harvest
description: Dive into 'Farm Tiles Harvest,' an engaging tile-matching game set in a quaint farm setting! Draw up to 9 tiles featuring fruits, veggies, and farming tools. Try to draw 3 similar tiles to clear them, or drawing the 9th tile will end the game. Shuffle tiles to reveal hidden ones, and complete each level within the time limit. Can you harvest them all?

title: The Stone Miner
description: Become the ultimate mining tycoon in The Stone Miner! Drive your powerful mining machine through various fantasy terrains. Crush, collect and smash stones like never before! Steer your mine cart through rocks of different colors and materials and enjoy the exhilarating experience of stone mining. Sell collected stones for gold, and unlock new areas full of rare materials and surprises! Upgrade your vehicle to mine faster and deeper, turning your gear into a true beast!

title: Zombie Monster Survivors
description: Zombie Monster Survivors is a role-playing game where you will become a brave survivor. Fight against terrifying zombies and monsters in an amazing world. Use your resources wisely and defeat the monsters and zombies that keep coming. Try to survive in this extreme environment. Keep moving and attack large waves of zombies. Collect coins or energy and choose your skills.

title: Circuit Master
description: Circuit Master is a puzzle game where you aim to get a green light by connecting the circuit correctly! Arrange the wires, fans, and machines in the right places, then turn on the button to see the electricity flow. Only the correctly connected circuit will make the green light shine. Use hints if you need help.

title: Archer Legend
description: Play Archery Battle Legend, the ultimate bow and arrow game! Test your aim in exciting archery battles, shoot targets, and defeat enemies like a true archer hero. Perfect for US students searching “archery game,” “stickman archer,” or “cool math games bow and arrow,” this free online challenge mixes skill, action, and fun. With endless levels, epic duels, and fast arrow shooting, sharpen your skills and become the legendary archer everyone talks about!

title: Black Pink St.Patricks day Concert
description: Step into the glamorous world of Black Pink St. Patrick’s Day Concert, the ultimate dress-up game! Style your favorite Black Pink members with trendy outfits, accessories, and makeup to make them shine for their St. Patrick’s Day performance. With simple controls and endless creativity, this game is perfect for quick fun or long gaming sessions.

title: Brain Test IQ Challenge 2
description: Ready for the wonderful challenge of your brain power? Brain Test IQ Challenge 2 is here! This is a brainstorming puzzle game that combines drawing, jumping, multiplayer battle, maze escape and other ways to play. Activate your brain in a second! In draw master, underlining guides the character into the correct restroom.

title: Jigsaw Fantasy
description: Jigsaw Fantasy is the perfect game for puzzle lovers! Choose from a wide collection of puzzles, each offering a relaxing and fun experience. Want a personal touch? Upload your family photos and turn them into custom puzzles. Simply drag and drop the scattered pieces into place to complete the image. With intuitive controls and a clean interface, Jigsaw Fantasy is great for kids and adults alike.

title: Battler
description: Immerse yourself in the world of tactical card battles, where your victory depends on the right choice and combinations of skills! You are fighting against decks of treacherous enemies. Choose one of three unique characters and immerse yourself in exciting battles. Use the character editor to fine-tune your character, adding unique abilities.

title: BFFs K-Pop Fangirls
description: This exciting game lets you follow the day-to-day life of two real K-pop fangirls. During the day they keep up with their professional lives, but when the clock stickers 6 PM, they gear up in fashionable combat outfits and chase their favorite K-pop idols throughout the city. Get it started, and have a blast mixing and matching different clothing items, hairstyles, and accessories to create the perfect looks for our best friends. Show off your fashion skills by dressing up your favorite girls.

title: Tap-Hold
description: Tap & Hold is a fast-paced neon cyberpunk flight arcade game. Hold to fly up, release to fall down. Navigate through dangerous obstacles, collect coins, grab power-ups, and unlock unique characters. How far can you fly?

title: Sort: My Parking Area
description: It's time to leave the parking lot, but other cars are blocking your way! Move them in the right order to clear the path! Tight parking spaces, challenging obstacles, and unexpected challenges await you in this exciting and engaging game.

title: Striped Fruit - Watermelon Land
description:
Welcome to the enchanting world of Striped Fruit that full of strategy and fun. Here, you'll become a watermelon maker extraordinaire, mastering the art of fruit merge to create the juiciest combinations on the board. As a merge master, you'll tap, drop, and combine fruits in a strategic dance.

The challenge? To reach your way to the top, the first step is to merge 2 melons to create a watermelon - the King of Fruits. Can you merge 2 watermelons to smash them out? Let's check it out!

title: Car Racing 3D Drive Mad
description: Here is a car racing arcade game. You have a chance to control a car equiped with nitro system. You can collect the fuel to charge it. Try to defeat other AI players by avoiding obstacles and using nitro items. Have a good time!

title: Pull The Pins
description: Pull the Pins is a strategic puzzle game where you must carefully pull pins in the correct order to rescue a young boy and make him reach his brother. Each decision matters, as a wrong move could lead to failure. Plan your actions wisely and use problem-solving skills to ensure a successful rescue.

title: Sid & Ginny Y2K Glam Clash
description: Welcome to the Y2K style fashion world! Two charismatic heroines are waiting for you, ready to try on fashion trends from the 2000s. Create spectacular makeup for them with lip gloss, shining shadows and glossy skin; choose stylish hairstyles - from smooth straight hair to playful ponytails and fashionable hairpins. Experiment with low-cut jeans, crop tops, mini skirts, shiny fabrics, and bold combinations. Complete the resulting image with iconic accessories of those years.

title: Arcade Rope
description:
Swing between platforms in Arcade Rope! Play free and online in this rope-swinging adventure.
Arcade Rope is a fast-paced and addictive skill game where your goal is to swing from platform to platform using a rope. Perfectly time your swings to avoid falling into the abyss and see how far you can go. The gameplay is simple yet challenging, making it ideal for quick play sessions. Stay alert, react quickly, and master the art of swinging to survive longer.

title: Earth Defender
description:
Earth Defender is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a spaceship orbiting around planet Earth. Deadly meteors are flying toward the planet, and it's your mission to stop them before they crash into Earth.

Your ship circles the planet. Time your moves carefully and collide with incoming meteors to destroy them

Tap to change your orbit direction and intercept as many meteors as possible. Survive the meteor storm and defend Earth for as long as you can!

title: Hotfoot Baseball
description:
Simple baseball game with fun, cartoony players and easy one-click controls. It’s fast to learn and fun to play!

Unlike other baseball games, the action doesn’t stop after you hit the ball. You need to decide when to run, move to the next base, and try to score runs. It’s all about timing and quick decisions.

Pick one of the best baseball countries and try to win the championship. The game keeps the excitement of baseball but with simple rules, so anyone can enjoy it.

title: Jewel Legend Quest
description: The most legendary quest of your life begins! Miners from all around the world have come to get their hands on these precious gems. Join them in the effort and engage in various challenges while trying to dig out as many diamonds as possible.

title: Christmas Snowball Arena
description: Christmas Snowball Arena is a 3D stickman snowball IO game. You have to compete with nine other players in collecting snow blocks and making your snowball bigger. The goal is to be the last player standing by defeating and collecting other snowballs. You can also collect blank snowballs that are free for anyone. You can use two power-ups in the game to boost your snowball: one that makes it twice as big and another that makes it twice as fast. If you are looking for some snowball action, try it!

title: Space Shooter - Speed Typing Challenge
description:
Get ready for an exciting space adventure that helps you improve your typing skills! In this free educational online word game, you'll pilot a spaceship and face waves of enemies.

It's a fun way to boost your typing speed and accuracy. Jump into your spaceship, start typing, and help save the galaxy one word at a time!

Think you're the fastest typist in the galaxy? Prove it! The universe is counting on you - start your adventure now and become the ultimate space hero!

title: Shanghai Town
description:
Mahjong matching game!
If you select the same mahjong block, it will be removed.
Please remove the last block!
Match the tiles to create a cool building!
Collect the buildings and create a cool city!

title: Stickman Jump
description: stickman run at full speed, control stickman jump to avoid direct collision. complete each challenging and difficult level

title: Strange packages
description:
You wake up alone in an empty apartment where everything seems calm… until the first knock at the door. Nameless parcels, mysterious objects, eerie creatures, and meaningless incantations turn your cozy home into a nightmarish trap.

Who is sending you these items — an enemy or a savior?
Why do toys come to life, eyes grow on the walls, and a ceiling-high worm bursts from the bathtub?

title: ASMR Washing & Fixing
description: This game is one of the cleaning games that gives you a real experience like no other. Most of the cleaning and organizing games on the market are 2D, but this game brings you a 3D experience. At the beginning of the game, you can pick a cool tool. There are 5 levels in this game and you can pick a level to start your cleaning. You can move your position as well as use the cleaning tool by clicking on the buttons on the screen or by hitting the keyboard.

title: Monster Arena
description: Be the longest monster ever! Beat out your rival monsters by eating fruits and grows. This snake io game let you roam free, grow large, and finish your enemies by making them crash into you. Be the king of the island!

title: Golden Frontier
description: This simulation game takes you on a Wild West adventure. Mine and manage resources, grow crops and craft goods as you aim to build a thriving city in the frontier lands. Invite friends to become your neighbors to trade and co-op, and progress quicker. Hunt for gold, unlock new locations, and discover secrets as the story unfolds. Meet a colorful cast of characters, including trappers, Indians and criminals.

title: My Farm life
description: My Farm life is a fun farm adventure simulator game. Plant fields, take care of animals, hire workers and build bigger barns. Harvest apples, wheat, tomatoes, eggplants and all your favorite fruits and vegetables. Raise all kinds of cute pets like your own farm dog, breed cows, sheep and hens for milk and eggs. Become the richest farming tycoon, sit back and enjoy!

title: Car Dealer Idle
description: Ever dreamed of becoming a top Car Dealer? In Car Dealer Idle, you’ll manage your own vehicle business. Buy and sell cars, expand your showroom, and grow into a real tycoon. Make smart management decisions, upgrade your dealership, and watch your profits skyrocket. Unlock more booths to sell cooler vehicles. Unlock repair areas, test drive areas, etc.

title: Math Box Balance
description: Math Box Balance is a puzzle game with numbers. Early levels have 2 boxes, and as you progress you can reach up to 8 boxes. Each box contains 4 number blocks, and the sum of these numbers is shown inside the box. Your goal is to make the sum of all boxes equal. You can swap number blocks between boxes to achieve the equal sum. It is an endless game where the difficulty increases over time, your score goes up, and the fun grows with it.

title: Knock and Run. 100 Doors Escape
description: Become the fastest and most daring stickman in this fun arcade game! Your goal is to race through the corridors of the hotel, ring the doors, knock and slam them, arranging epic pranks. The main thing is not to get caught! Residents' reactions are unpredictable, and danger can lurk around every corner.

title: Cunning Ginger
description: Cunning Ginger is a super fun game that'll give you lots of excitement and intense emotions! The game follows the adventures of a cute red cat, Ginger, as he goes on a great journey around the world. He's catching falling food items and dodging all sorts of dangerous things along the way. Your goal in the game is to help Ginger explore the world and pick up as many goodies as possible. But beware - there are tons of dangerous obstacles that could harm your furry friend.

title: Ninja Climb
description: Embark on a thrilling ascent in Ninja Climb, a captivating 2D game where your nimble ninja scales towering buildings. Click to seamlessly leap between structures, dodging obstacles along the way, and utilize rewarded video ads to revive when challenges arise, ensuring an adrenaline-packed ninja adventure.

title: Dragon Draw Joust
description: Prepare for a wildly creative showdown in Dragon Draw Joust, where your imagination becomes your strongest weapon! Instead of choosing gear from a menu, you must draw your own tools to defend your warrior and survive intense combat challenges. Every match feels fresh because your strategy starts with your creativity. Your creation instantly becomes part of your character, helping you block attacks or strike opponents inside the chaotic battle arena.

title: Cooking Festival
description: Cooking Festival is a delicious management sim that will let you bake, fry and grill around the world! Become the master chef the cooking world has been waiting for and whip up some homemade pancakes, grill juicy ribs, bake aromatic original Italian pizzas, and serve delicious ice cream that everyone loves!

title: Runic Block Collapse
description: Welcome to 'Runic Block Collapse'! Tap any block to clear connected blocks in a chain reaction. Removing one block costs 250 points. Removing 2 or more blocks earns points, with larger groups earning more per block. Reach the target score to advance. If you fail, start over. Enjoy endless fun!

title: My Purrfect Cat Hotel
description: Welcome to My Purrfect Cat Hotel, a super cute cat hotel simulation management game. Enjoy cute and vivid cartoon cat animations. This is the vacation spot for all meow stars, and your mission is to create the most cozy cat hotel. Serving a variety of adorable cats and catering to their needs. Make your hotel the most popular animal tycoon hotel.

title: Ragdoll Football 2 Players
description: Ragdoll Football 2 players is an exciting and fun sports game in which you can feel like a real football player! Fight with friends or the computer by controlling a ragdoll stickman on the football field. Show your skills and wit to score grand goals and become a champion.

title: Halloween Stickman 2
description: It's a continuation of Halloween Stickman story. The streets are alive with people in costumes, glowing jack-o'-lanterns, and the buzz of tricks waiting to unfold. You were set to enjoy a thrilling Halloween night until your sly friend Stickman, the master of mischief, pulled another one of his classic pranks and set you up again. Now, it’s up to you to turn the tables, use your wits, and punish the trickster in this spooky adventure!

title: Tetro Merge
description:
Tetro Merge is a physics-based merge puzzle game where Tetromino blocks come to life.
You’ll drop Tetrominoes of all shapes—classic, extended, and brand-new originals. When two matching pieces touch, they merge into a bigger, more complex block.
Master the bounce, plan your stacks, and build powerful combos as the board slowly fills up.
Will you manage your space wisely… or let the blocks overflow?
A perfect blend of strategy, physics, and classic Tetris nostalgia.

title: Stickman escapes from prison
description: New prison escape adventures welcome you! Your task is to play as a Stickman and find all the ways to successfully escape from prison. 10 different items to choose from are hidden in a secret place. Some items will lead you to victory, but many other items will lead you to death. Interesting animations and jokes will delight your attention. Check out all the items and enjoy the different situations in the zone.

title: Rainbow Friends. Survival
description:
A fun and dangerous game about Rainbow Friends!
You are in a dangerous place. You need to survive 5 days and 5 nights, but the deadly obstacle will be the terrifying and bloodthirsty monsters Rainbow Friends!
Complete all the missions, move fast, perform actions carefully and run away from the monstrous monsters!

title: Mahjong At Home - Scandinavian Edition
description: Immerse yourself in the minimalist elegance of the North with 'Mahjong at Home: Scandinavian Winter Edition'. This high-quality Mahjong game celebrates the sleek, modern design of Scandinavian style, blending festive themes with clean, sophisticated aesthetics for a uniquely cozy winter gaming experience.

title: Bubble Shooter Temple Jewels
description: Embark on a temple adventure in Bubble Shooter Temple Jewels! Pop colorful bubbles as you progress through ancient ruins inspired by Central American temples. Keep track of your journey with the Stats screen, showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With vibrant visuals, exciting challenges, and detailed progress tracking, this bubble shooter keeps you motivated to aim higher and improve every round!

title: Beat The Zombies
description: Beat the Zombies is a vertical action RPG blending strategy and adventure. Explore a dangerous plant-zombie world, fight through stages, and defeat all plant zombies in your way!

title: Mine Jump
description: Jump into action! ? Test your logic and reflexes in this addictive game. Collect slugs, upgrade your hero, and uncover the secrets of a mysterious planet! ?✨

title: Put the fruit together!
description: A game in the genre of "Connect the Balls" and "2048". Stack identical fruits to combine them into a new larger fruit! The game has incredibly beautiful and cute graphics, nice music accompaniment and addictive gameplay!

title: My Little Car Wash
description: Wash and shine with My Little Car Wash, a 2D cartoon game that lets you clean different vehicles. You don’t need any experience, just follow the hints and use the tools to make the vehicles look new. You will have 22 vehicles to choose from, each with its dirt and stains. You will also have the drivers watching you as you work, so be quick and efficient. You will earn yellow stars for each vehicle you wash. My Little Car Wash is a game that will teach you some washing skills! Have fun!

title: Hyper Cars Ramp Crash
description: "Hyper Cars Ramp Crash" is a 3D stunt and crash simulation game with realistic physics and graphics. You can perform incredible stunts in many different modes with great looking cars. 7 different super-sport car models are waiting in the garage for you to try them. Open world, stunt modes and fall mode can be played in 1-player and 2-player modes.

title: Idle Merge Car And Race
description:
An addictive idle car merging game. Build your own car racing company and grow your business.
Move your cars to the racing track and earn money every time they cross the finish line. Buy new cars (or collect them from the gift boxes), and merge the same level cars to upgrade into a new type. The better the cars, the more money you will earn. Use your earnings to buy upgrade packages in the Shop to help you make money faster! Become the richest in the world in this idle merge car game.

title: Hidden Objects Island
description: Discover the ultimate hidden objects game and embark on a journey through stunning locations, captivating puzzles, and mysterious adventures!

title: Draw Brige Puzzle
description:
Draw Bridge Puzzle Game is an exciting and challenging brain game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test.
In this bridge-building adventure, your task is to draw paths for the car to safely navigate through obstacles and reach its destination.
Get ready to embark on a thrilling journey of bridge construction and puzzle-solving as you draw roads to rescue the stranded car!

title: Parkour World 2
description:
Welcome to Parkour World 2, an exhilarating Minecraft-inspired parkour game with thrilling challenges and delightful gameplay. 
-Each level in this game boasts its own distinct and features, ensuring a fresh and exciting experience every time you play. 
-While the initial levels may seem relatively simple, as you progress through the game. By the time you conquer the first ten levels, you'll find yourself facing increasingly demanding obstacles.
-Get ready to run, and conquer in Parkour World!

title: Puzzle - LINES AND KNOTS 1
description:
Easy to understand mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes.
▪ 150 Levels
▪ Achievements

title: Ammo Rush Master
description:
Get ready to run, multiply, and blast your way to victory in Ammo Rush Master!
Dodge obstacles, choose the right gates, and build the biggest Ammo army of bullets. Then, grab your blaster and unleash a storm of foam darts to smash through targets, enemies, and bosses!

title: Mushroom Fever Match 3
description:
Immerse yourself in the magical forest with Mushroom Fever - Match 3! Bright and cheerful mushrooms replace traditional crystals, adding a fresh twist to the classic match-3 genre. This game will bring you hours of thrilling fun and bursts of excitement!

Match groups of three or more mushrooms, complete engaging tasks, and unlock new levels! Each level brings unique puzzles and fresh challenges. The more matches you make, the more points and bonuses you’ll earn!

title: Banana Farm
description: Embark on Banana Farm, an engaging business casual game catering to cat enthusiasts. As a diligent feline entrepreneur, oversee market operations and recruit adorable cat workers to enhance efficiency. Cultivate bananas and various products while serving charming cat customers eagerly queuing up. Ready to launch your supermarket?

title: Love Archer
description: Welcome to "Love Archer" - an addictive game where you, as the cheerful Cupid, use your archery skills to bring together all the lovers! Solve puzzles, throw arrows at creatures, and they will find themselves in a magical garden, possessed by love. Are you ready, little hero? Shoot arrows of love to create different loving couples. Even an orc and a human can become happy parents. Combine them and watch love win!

title: Granny GTA Vegas
description: Granny GTA Vegas drops the infamous horror legend into the heart of sin city! Armed and unhinged, Granny escapes her haunted house and brings chaos to the neon streets of Las Vegas. With red-hooded masked enemies hot on her trail, she must shoot her way through crime-ridden alleys, casino districts, and the Vegas Strip.

title: Coin Merge
description: Coin Merge invites players into a captivating challenge of organization and strategy. Begin by sorting coins by color into designated slots, strategically merging them once a slot is filled to create new, uniquely colored coins. As levels progress, the pace quickens and the challenge intensifies, demanding swift decision-making and careful planning to keep up with the increasing complexity. Engage your mind in this addictive puzzle game where efficiency and foresight lead to mastery.

title: Real Car Parking Simulator
description:
Get ready to test your driving skills in Real Car Parking Simulator. In the parking simulation game, you will face various parking challenges. With realistic controls and detailed environments,you’ll feel like you're actually behind the wheel. From parallel parking to tight garage spaces,
this game offers many parking challenges.

title: Super Hero Driving School
description:
Drive unique super hero vehicles and perform stunts on multiple crazy tracks.

It’s a bird! No, it’s a plane! Or maybe a car? What the hell is that thing? I want to drive this right now! 

So buckle up and prepare for super fun times in Super Hero Driving School. Because even heroes need a driving license, you know! 

Drive, and fly unique super hero vehicles and perform stunts like never before. And be careful, because super heroes can have super crashes! :D

title: Ultimate Destruction Simulator
description: Unleash your destructive side in this ultimate demolition experience! Enjoy realistic tower destruction with dynamic physics, and take control of time—slow it down, speed it up, or freeze the action. Experiment with gravity modes, from low to high or even zero gravity, and customize every detail, including debris levels, destructibility, and atmospheric dust. Built for fans of destruction, this game offers the smash-and-crash fun you've been craving!

title: Egg Adventure 2
description: Mr Egg comes back, and also a challenge of intelligence and imagination.In egg adventure 2,you need to operate the Eggs to solve various puzzles and get out of the door.Imaginative levels ann funny painting style will take you into a whole ner puzzle world!The key to solving the puzzle may be a word or an action, that can you give it a try？

title: CloneUp - Stack Yourself
description:
CloneUp – Stack Yourself is a 2D pixel-art platformer where your greatest tool is… yourself!

Create clones, stack them, and use them as platforms to dodge spikes, reach new heights, and make your way to the exit door.

In CloneUp – Stack Yourself, you’ll use copies of the main character to reach platforms and avoid deadly obstacles.

title: Pin Puzzle Save The Sheep
description: Pin Puzzle: Save The Sheep is an exciting pin-pulling game. You will test your brain intelligence and have endless fun. In this game, you have to make the sheep eat food and save them from their predicament. You have many other tasks like pulling the pin to make the dog eat the food. But be aware that you may meet a lot of obstacles like bombs, lava, etc. and you need to avoid them. There are many interesting levels to play in this crazy puzzle game. Come and join the game.

title: Save Her Tour
description: This complex and relaxing puzzle game you've read about has finally become a reality! Only the smartest can pass these brain teaser quizzes and save the girl! Each level will give you a scenario where you must use your ingenuity to solve the problem. If you mess up, it won't end well for our heroine. There are so many different challenges waiting to be solved. This is the best puzzle game ever! Solve interesting puzzles, protect the girl from harm, and experience the thrill of success.

title: Eat Blobs Simulator
description: The battle of the blobs and slimes is beginning in this great eating simulator. Pick your slime character and start competing against others. Eat smaller blobs and slimes, and make yours bigger than the others. Become the king of the blob arena! Buy various blob skins during the game. On each game, receive various rewards with the blob sizes and coins. Chase smaller blobs and eat them. Collect blobs around and increase your score.

title: Super Dog Hero Dash
description: Super Dog Hero Dash is an interesting 3D running game with endless adventure and fun! You’ll become a brave dog hero running through a colorful city in this cartoonish world. Begin exciting challenges across various platforms!

title: Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier
description:
Step into the world of retail and build the supermarket of your dreams! 

Manage customers, run the cash register, stock shelves, and keep your store thriving. From scanning groceries to cart-surfing adventures, every task brings your bustling market to life.

Take charge as the supermarket cashier, master time management, and turn your small store into a thriving grocery empire.

title: Stealth Master Sneak Cat
description: Stealth Master: Sneak Cat is a fun stealth adventure game that lets you play the role of a cute cat. You will sneak through various missions! Move quietly under the close watch of enemies and surveillance equipment.

title: Zumba Story
description: Explore every corner of the jungle, create combinations and shoot colorful marbles. With each level, face unique challenges and utilize powerful boosters to enhance your skills. Unlock exciting chapters, conquer obstacles, and experience a vibrant journey full of surprises!

title: Mr. Macagi Adventures
description:
Embark on a daring expedition through the whimsical landscapes of Mr. Macagi's Adventure! 

Guide Mr. Macagi through perilous terrains, braving cunning monsters. With 4 stages set amidst the dense foliage of the forest and 4 in the unforgiving heat of the desert, prepare for a test of skill and strategy.

Can you help Mr. Macagi collect apples and gold coins, and outsmart the cunning monsters that inhabit them? Explore, strategize, and conquer in this thrilling platformer adventure!

title: Dice Puzzle
description: Dice Puzzle is a smart, satisfying merge game where you place numbered dice on a grid to combine matches and build higher values. Plan ahead, manage limited space, and handle dice that appear solo or in pairs. Every move matters—chain merges, grow your numbers, and test your strategy in this addictive dice challenge.

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is a creative and exciting puzzle game that combines drawing and rescue gameplay into one addictive experience. You become a bridge designer, using your finger to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Enter the car mode, draw a strong bridge to help a motor cross gaps, broken roads, and dangerous obstacles to reach the goal.

title: Bubble Trouble 2: Rebubbled
description:
A classic arcade bubble shooter where you play as a devil in a trench coat, armed with a harpoon gun to tackle dangerous bouncing bubbles. Each bubble you shoot splits into smaller ones until they're completely destroyed. Navigate through levels with platforms and power-ups while avoiding contact with any bubble.

How to play:
- Clear all bubbles from each level to progress
- Avoid getting touched by bubbles - or lose a life
- Features single-player and cooperative multiplayer modes

title: Challenge Your Friends
description: Challenge yourself! With seven different games, you can experience thrilling moments whether you're playing solo or competing against your friends. Drunken Duel, Tug The Table, Stick Duel, Milk The Cow, and many more games are waiting for you!
